title: Finansal Planlama & Strateji Stajyer
description: GENEL NİTELİKLER VE İŞ TANIMI MR.DIY ilk olarak Temmuz 2005'te Kuala Lumpur, Malezya'daki Jalan Tuanku Abdul Rahman'da küçük bir hırdavatçı dükkanı olarak kapılarını açtı. Bugün, dünya çapında 4000'den fazla mağazasıyla MR.DIY, Malezya, Singapur, Tayland, Brunei, Endonezya, Filipinler, Kamboçya, Hindistan, İspanya ve şimdi Türkiye ile birlikte ilk defa Avrupa’da mağaza ağını genişleterek dünya çapındaki en yaygın Yapı Market ve Ev Gereçleri perakendecilerinden biri haline gelmeyi hedefliyor. Bu amaçla MR DIY Türkiye'deki ilk mağazasını Ümraniye Meydan AVM'de açtı. MR.DIY mağazaları, çoğunlukla mağaza başına yaklaşık ortalama 1.000m2 üzerine kurulu, ortalama 18.000 ürün çeşiti sunarak konforlu ve sağlıklı bir aile alışveriş deneyimi sunmaktadır. MR.DIY, dünya çapındaki tüm mağazalarında yıllık 188 milyondan fazla müşteriye hizmet vermektedir. MR.DIY şirket misyonu, “Daima uygun fiyat” sloganına sadık kalarak, geniş ürün yelpazesi sunarak, dünya çapında tanınan Yapı Market ve Ev Gereçleri Perakendecisi olmak. İstanbul Levent'te bulunan merkez ofislerimizde çalışmak üzere arayışımız bulunmaktadır. Görev Tanımı: Fiyatlama stratejisi çalışmalarına analitik destek sağlamak Mağaza performans analizlerine katkıda bulunmak Yeni mağaza fizibilite çalışmalarında veri analizi yapmak Yönetim raporlamaları için veri hazırlamak ve analiz desteği sunmak Ad-hoc analiz ve proje bazlı çalışmalara katkı sağlamak Bütçe takip süreçlerine destek vermek Aranan Nitelikler: Üniversitelerin İşletme, Ekonomi, Endüstri Mühendisliği, İstatistik veya ilgili bölümlerinde 3. 4. sınıf öğrencisi veya yeni mezun Finansal analiz ve veri yorumlama konularına ilgi duyan Analitik düşünme yeteneği güçlü Detay odaklı, öğrenmeye açık ve sorumluluk almaya istekli Tercihen perakende sektörüne ilgi duyan Tercihen excel bilgisine sahip Show more Show less

title: Stajyer Grafik Tasarımcısı
description: Rems’te tasarım sadece görsel üretmek değil, fikir üretmektir. Bizimle birlikte markalar için yaratıcı işler üretecek, kendini geliştirmek isteyen Stajyer Grafik Tasarımcı arıyoruz. Eğer tasarım dünyasına adım atmak, gerçek projelerde yer almak ve ajans temposunu deneyimlemek istiyorsan doğru yerdesin. Aradığımız Özellikler • Photoshop ve Illustrator programlarına temel düzeyde hakim olmak • Sosyal medya tasarımlarına ilgi duymak • Yaratıcı düşünmeye açık olmak • Yeni şeyler öğrenmeye istekli olmak • Takım çalışmasına uyum sağlayabilmek Staj Sürecinde • Sosyal medya içerikleri tasarlayacaksın • Kampanya ve reklam projelerinde ekibe destek olacaksın • Farklı markalar için yaratıcı çalışmalar üreteceksin • Ajans ortamında gerçek deneyim kazanacaksın Konum: Kayseri Portföyün veya örnek çalışmalarınla birlikte başvurunu bekliyoruz. title: Web Internship Opportunity for 4th Year Students
description: Overview Are you a motivated and ambitious student eager to gain long-term, hands-on experience in software development? We are looking for talented and enthusiastic 4th-year engineering or computer science students who are passionate about honing their skills in Angular. As a long-term intern at our company, you will have the chance to work on real-world projects, contribute to product development, and gain valuable insights into various aspects of the software development lifecycle. If you're ready to take the next step in your career and commit to an extended internship experience, we encourage you to apply today! Responsibilities Collaborate with the development team to design, develop, and maintain web applications. Write clean, efficient, and well-documented code using Angular. Participate in code reviews and contribute to improving code quality. Assist in troubleshooting, debugging, and optimizing application performance. Research and implement new technologies to enhance our products and processes. Requirements Currently enrolled as a 4th-year student in Computer Engineering, Software Engineering, or a related field. Basic knowledge of Angular (academic or personal projects are acceptable). Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail. Good communication skills and ability to work in a team. (Nice to have) Familiarity with C#. Who We Are We are a global technology company, developing AI-powered conversational solutions that empower organizations to be data-driven, enhance efficiency, and offer superior customer experiences. We are an R&D center and our solutions are developed by a team of over 100 engineers specializing in text-to-speech, speech recognition, natural language processing, and voice biometrics technologies. As of 2022 we are a part of Unifonic, a leading Communications Platform as a Service (CPaaS) provider, we have grown into an international organization with over 500 dynamic team members. We have a customer base of 500 enterprises across 20 countries in the US, EU and MENA regions. At Sestek, we believe in the power of diversity, and inclusive organizational culture. All candidates are considered equally regardless of their race, religion, color, age, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, national or ethnic origin, marital status, family status, disability, genetic characteristics. If you would like to know more about our culture, please feel free to visit our LinkedIn Page. Show more Show less

title: Monetization Intern
description: Lucida AI is a fast-growing AI startup building speech-based AI learning and conversational applications used by millions of users globally. We are looking for a Monetization Intern who wants to learn how subscription and in-app purchase monetization works at scale and help optimize revenue across our mobile apps. This role is highly hands-on and ideal for candidates who are curious about subscriptions, paywalls, pricing experiments, and gamification-driven monetization . What You'll Do Support optimization of in-app purchases, subscriptions, and offer structures (weekly, monthly, yearly plans, trials, intro offers). Help design monetization mechanics connected to gamification features (rewards, streaks, unlockable premium features). Assist in analyzing paywall and purchase funnel performance (conversion, trial activation, renewal). Support execution of A/B tests on pricing, bundles, messaging, and paywall layouts. Track key monetization metrics such as conversion rate, ARPU, retention, and churn. Research competitor monetization strategies and summarize insights. Work closely with Product, Growth, and Design teams to improve revenue performance. Requirements 3rd or 4th year university student or recent graduate (Engineering, Economics, Business, or related fields). Strong interest in mobile apps, monetization, pricing, or growth. Analytical mindset and comfort working with data (Excel / Sheets preferred). Curiosity about subscription business models and experimentation. Fluent English communication skills. Able to work full-time internship (3-6 months) Benefits Work directly on real monetization decisions impacting millions of users globally. Learn how leading mobile AI apps optimize subscriptions, paywalls, and LTV. Fast-learning startup environment with real ownership from day one. Opportunity to transition into a full-time Monetization / Growth role after the internship. Show more Show less

title: People & Culture Intern (Long-Term)
description: Founded in Belgium in 1961, Ravago is a prominent global brand with operations in over 60 countries, more than 325 locations, and over 10,000 employees serving over 56,000 customers. Ravago continues to make a global impact within Europe, North America, Asia, and Africa. Guided by our mission to “to be at the heart of your life,” we are committed to growing and strengthening our presence every day, upholding our values of entrepreneurship, professionalism, humility, and human-focus. Ravago Turkey, headquartered in Ataşehir, operates with over 1,600 employees across 16 locations throughout Turkey. One of the largest petrochemical producers in Turkey, we aim to meet special product demands that are not available in the market with our extensive product range and R&D efforts. We are not only one of the top industrial enterprises but are also a preferred brand in more than 50 countries where we export our products. We are looking for a Long-Term Intern – People & Culture to join Ravago Türkiye at our Ataşehir office . Desired Qualifications: Currently enrolled as an undergraduate student at a university Mandatory internship insurance provided by the university Able to attend the internship at least 3 - 4 days per week Proficiency in MS Office programs Strong communication skills, analytical thinking ability, and a team-oriented mindset Eager to learn and open to personal and professional development What We Expect from You: Support daily operational tasks within the People & Culture (HR) Department Assist in recruitment processes , including job posting follow-ups, candidate communication, and interview scheduling Support training and development processes , including entering and tracking training records in relevant systems Assist in the coordination of training activities and maintain related documentation Collaborate with team members and support ongoing HR projects and initiatives Additional Information: This position is for a long-term internship opportunity within the People & Culture Department . Interviews will be conducted online. Only candidates whose internship insurance is covered by their university and who meet the requirements will be evaluated. Show more Show less

title: Agency Operations Project Intern (TTLIVE-MENAT) - 2026 Start (BS/MS)
description: Responsibilities We are the Agency Operations Team, focusing on the construction and growth of the TikTok LIVE Agency Ecosystem. We are mainly responsible for Agency Recruitment and Incubation, helping the high-quality development of live streaming business. As a project intern, you will have the opportunity to engage in impactful short-term projects that provide you with a glimpse of professional real-world experience. You will gain practical skills through on-the-job learning in a fast-paced work environment and develop a deeper understanding of your career interests. Applications will be reviewed on a rolling basis - we encourage you to apply early. Responsibilities: Support offline and online recruitment events, sort out agency resources, follow up on the progress of connections and complete recruitment-related follow up. Be responsible for new Agency Education-related work, including the creation of educational materials (manuals, PPT, etc.), online/offline meeting presentations, and daily agency Q&A, to help new Agencies get started with the business quickly; Assist AM (Account Manager) in incubating potential agencies, follow up on the growth progress and monitor agency's task completion rate. Be responsible for data analysis related to recruitment and operations, statistics of core data such as agency recruitment conversion rate, education completion rate, and incubation effect, and output basic analysis reports to support business optimization; Cooperate with the team to complete other daily agency operation-related work to ensure the efficient implementation of various businesses. Qualifications Minimum Qualifications Currently pursuing a bachelor's degree or above, major is not limited; able to commit to at least 4 working days per week for an internship period of 3 months or more (6 months is preferred) High level of fluency in Turkish and English Strong interest in the Internet industry, live streaming field (TikTok LIVE is preferred) and agency operations Good data analysis and summary capabilities, proficient in using Excel for data statistics and basic analysis, able to quickly sort out business problems and judge priorities Proficient in using Office software (Word, PPT), with basic copywriting and material creation capabilities Strong communication, coordination, negotiation and learning abilities, serious and responsible at work, with good team spirit and execution Preferred Qualifications Internship experience in Agency operations, channel recruitment or user operations is preferred; Familiarity with the Turkish live streaming market and local agency characteristics is preferred; Experience in data analysis, ability to independently output simple analysis reports and possess certain business insight capabilities is preferred. Proficiency in tools such as PS and Figma is a plus Job Information About TikTok TikTok is the leading destination for short-form mobile video. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. TikTok's global headquarters are in Los Angeles and Singapore, and we also have offices in New York City, London, Dublin, Paris, Berlin, Dubai, Jakarta, Seoul, and Tokyo. Why Join Us Inspiring creativity is at the core of TikTok's mission. Our innovative product is built to help people authentically express themselves, discover and connect – and our global, diverse teams make that possible. Together, we create value for our communities, inspire creativity and bring joy - a mission we work towards every day. We strive to do great things with great people. We lead with curiosity, humility, and a desire to make impact in a rapidly growing tech company. Every challenge is an opportunity to learn and innovate as one team. We're resilient and embrace challenges as they come. By constantly iterating and fostering an "Always Day 1" mindset, we achieve meaningful breakthroughs for ourselves, our company, and our users. When we create and grow together, the possibilities are limitless. Join us. Diversity & Inclusion TikTok is committed to creating an inclusive space where employees are valued for their skills, experiences, and unique perspectives. Our platform connects people from across the globe and so does our workplace. At TikTok, our mission is to inspire creativity and bring joy. To achieve that goal, we are committed to celebrating our diverse voices and to creating an environment that reflects the many communities we reach. We are passionate about this and hope you are too. title: Quality System Management Trainee
description: About Us PHINIA: Advancing sustainability today, powering a cleaner tomorrow. PHINIA is an independent, market-leading, premium solutions and components provider with over 100 years of manufacturing expertise and industry relationships, with a strong brand portfolio that includes DELPHI®, DELCO REMY® and HARTRIDGE™. With over 12,500 employees across 43 locations in 20 countries, PHINIA is headquartered in Auburn Hills, Michigan, USA. At PHINIA, we Provide fuel systems, electrical systems, and aftermarket products and solutions of the highest quality — developed and manufactured responsibly — that are designed to enhance efficiency and reduce the environmental impact of vehicles, industrial machinery, and other applications. In doing so, we contribute to a cleaner tomorrow, treat our people and surrounding communities with respect, and hold ourselves accountable to robust ethical standards. Our Culture PHINIA promotes and cultivates an inclusive culture and diverse perspectives, strives to maintain its reputation for excellence, thrives on the power of collaboration, and fosters the development of our talented employees. We believe in making a positive impact through our business and actions, and we take our collective responsibility seriously. Career Opportunities We believe in building a brighter tomorrow for our employees as well as our customers and encourage you to learn about our long history, strong culture, new technologies, and future vision. We offer a strong local presence and interesting global opportunities. Join us on this shared journey toward a brighter tomorrow. Job Purpose PHINIA is looking for a “Management Trainee” to work at its plant in Izmir for the Quality Department. Join us on this shared journey toward a brighter tomorrow! Key Responsibilities Graduating from the industrial, mechanical engineering department, etc. Fluency in English MS Office proficiency Strong problem-solving and analytical capabilities Strong communication skills Passionate to learn and eager to take initiative Quality Core Tools information is a plus What We Offer We provide compensation and benefits programs intended to attract, motivate, reward, and retain an incredibly talented, globally diverse workforce at all levels within our organization. Our compensation programs are informed by market data and business needs, and we are committed to providing equitable and competitive compensation. We are committed to providing our team with quality and competitive benefit programs, including health and well-being resources, family-centric policies, and an agile workplace program, where not precluded by collective bargaining agreements or national statutory plans. Plans are benchmarked for competitiveness and value. We provide formal development opportunities at all levels and stages of employee careers. These opportunities are delivered in a variety of formats to make our portfolio of solutions agile, sustainable, and scalable to support our employees in developing the skills needed to succeed. What We Believe Product Leadership - Innovation that brings value to our customers Humility - Seeking out diverse perspectives and working collaboratively Inclusivity - Recognizing our differences makes us stronger; we are bold and intentional Net-Zero - Committed to energy efficiency, waste reduction and beneficial reuse Integrity - Taking responsibility for our decisions and doing what is right Accountability - Taking ownership of our actions and driving results SAFETY You will consistently hear us say Safety First! We are committed to continually improving our strong safety performance supporting the health and wellness of our employees! We also believe employee health and safety is everyone’s responsibility. We encourage safety learning and collaboration to help employees understand and follow applicable safety policies, standards, and procedures and identify opportunities to minimize or eliminate risk. Work is expected to be conducted in a manner that stresses the importance of preventing incidents and illnesses, including attending all required safety meetings and trainings. It is expected that all incidents, near misses, and unsafe conditions are immediately reported to the direct manager, Human Resources, or Safety Representative. EQUAL EMPLOYMENT OPPORTUNITY PHINIA is an equal employment opportunity employer such that all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, age, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity/expression, national origin, disability or protected veteran status. VISA SPONSORSHIP PHINIA does provide sponsorship for employment visa status based on business need. However, for this role, applicants must be currently authorized to work on a full-time basis, in the country where the position is currently based. NO UNAUTHORIZED REFERRALS FROM RECRUITERS & VENDORS Please note that PHINIA does not seek or accept unsolicited resumes or offers from third party recruiters or staffing agencies associated with any published or unpublished employment opportunities. Any unsolicited information sent to PHINIA will be considered as unencumbered and free from any fee or charge whatsoever. Only members of our Human Resources Team have the authority to engage or authorize recruiting services, which must be agreed upon before the unsolicited resume or offer is received. GLOBAL TERMS OF USE AND PRIVACY STATEMENT Carefully read the PHINIA Privacy Policy before using this website. Your ability to access and use this website and apply for a job at PHINIA are conditioned on your acceptance and compliance with these terms. Please access the linked document by clicking here, select the geographical area where you are applying for employment, and review. Before submitting your application you will be asked to confirm your agreement with the terms. title: CAREER EXPERIENCE DRIVE – FINANCIAL OPERATIONS INTERN
description: VitrA Tiles, which ranks first in exports to the EU, started production in Istanbul Tuzla in 1991 and in Bilecik Bozüyük in 1992. VitrA Tiles, which has been producing ceramic tiles in its factory in Russia since 2011, has a total annual production capacity of 30 million square meters. VitrA Tiles products are offered for sale in 75 countries, especially in the Turkish and German markets. VitrA Tiles carries the 60 years of expertise of the VitrA brand to all living spaces in the house, especially the bathroom; It also offers products suitable for use in many different areas such as pools, gardens and exteriors. VitrA Tiles, which constantly develops innovative texture and material solutions, sets the trends in surfaces with its new collections every year. VitrA's tiles with the "TSE Double Star" Certificate also hold the first eco-label given by the European Union to a ceramic brand from Turkey. Our production facility in Bozuyuk has been included in the "Global Lighthouse Network", which the World Economic Forum (WEF) selects as the most advanced production facilities in the world and points out as the "production facility of the future". What Do We Expect From Our New Teammate? Preparation and updating of VAT (Value Added Tax) lists prepared for the tax office, Supporting the organization of documentation related to VAT declarations to ensure tax compliance, and submitting them to relevant authorities when necessary, Recording and updating data related to export-registered sales, Collaborating with exporting companies for the preparation and follow-up of customs declarations, Regular review of invoices, payments, and supplier reconciliations. You are exactly the person we are looking for! Your team is waiting for you! What kind of teammate are we looking for? If you are a 3rd-year student in a relevant undergraduate program, If you have a good command of English, If you can use MS Office programs efficiently, If you are available to participate in a long-term internship at least three days a week, If you are interested in the field of finance, If you are a team player with a solution-oriented mindset, If you are proactive, result-oriented, and have strong time management skills, If you enjoy taking responsibility and are eager to learn. «You should live your career, development, life and future at Eczacıbaşı!» What do we offer to you? You can constantly improve your personal, professional and technical competencies and participate in our training programs that will support you and your career. Global opportunities and rotation opportunities in more than 120 international markets among more than 40 organizations can always knock on your door. At Eczacıbaşı, leaves are calculated according to the person's seniority based on the person's total working experience. Your leave comes with you. We always applaud success with different reward methods. You can benefit from location-independent or hybrid working opportunities with working models that vary according to the nature of your job, and you can determine your own work schedule with flexible working hours. We offer a technology and ergonomics support package to Eczacıbaşı employees who work remotely full-time. It is privileged to be a mother and father at Eczacıbaşı. At Eczacıbaşı, our employees who are mothers are provided with monthly nursery allowance and our employees who are fathers are entitled to 3 weeks of paternity leave. We are committed to providing equal opportunity in employment. We value diversity and do not discriminate based on race, religion, color, national origin, gender, sexual orientation, age, marital status, or veteran status. #WeDoNotDifferentiateBetweenJobsForWomenAndMen Show more Show less

title: Kapasite Planlama Mühendisi
description: ASELSAN Mikroelektronik ve Elektro-Optik Sistemler (MEOS) Sektör Başkanlığı bünyesinde Akyurt yerleşkesindeki faaliyetlerimizde bize güç katacak; üniversitelerin Endüstri Mühendisliği bölümlerinden mezun Kapasite Planlama Mühendisi çalışma arkadaşları arıyoruz. BU POZİSYONDA EN ÖNEM VERDİĞİMİZ YETKİNLİKLER VE DENEYİMLER Üretim planlama ve takip alanında en az 2 yıl deneyimi olan, süreçlerine hakim ve bu alanda kariyer hedefi olan, Üretim planlama, çizelgeleme, kapasite planlama konularına hakim, ERP sistemleri(Tercihen SAP), MRP konusunda bilgi sahibi ve deneyimli, MS Excel, Power BI vb. araçları ileri seviyede kullanma becerisine sahip, Sap iş emri yönetimi konusunda bilgi sahibi, Zaman etüt konusunda bilgi sahibi, İş süreçlerini iyileştirmek, geliştirmek ve karar alma mekanizmalarını desteklemek için verilerden stratejik çıkarımlar yapabilen. SENDEN NELER BEKLİYORUZ? Kapasite ve kaynak planlaması, çizelgeleme yaparak üretim hattının verimliliğini artırmak, KPI’ ların iyileştirilmesi için gerekli aksiyonları almak, ERP sistemleri üzerinden ve hatlarda üretim süreçlerinin takibini yapmak, Günlük, haftalık, aylık çizelgeleri kapasite durumuna göre oluşturmak ve gerçekleşmeleri takip etmek, Çizelge sapmalarını analiz ederek üretim bölümleri ile birlikte iyileştirme çalışmaları için aksiyonların alınmasını sağlamak, Üretim planlama, çizelgeleme, kapasite yönetimi süreçlerinde dijitalleşme çalışmalarını gerçekleştirmek, verimlilik artışı sağlamak, SAP’ de iş emirlerinin yönetimini gerçekleştirmek, data doğruluğunu sağlamak, Üretim planlama ve takip faaliyetlerinde etkinliği ve verimliliği artıracak şekilde raporları tasarlamak, süreçlere entegre etmek, Üretim Planlama ve takip Sürecine ait süreç dokümanlarını (süreç dokümanı, iş talimatı, yönerge vb.) güncel tutmak ve idame etmek. İşe alım kriterlerimizi ASELSAN internet sayfamızda Kariyer Sekmesinde bulunan İşe Alım Sürecimiz alanından inceleyerek iş başvuru formumuzu doldur. ASELSAN ailesinin bir parçası olarak yerli ve milli projelerdeki başarımızda senin de imzan olsun. Biz Kimiz? Alanında dünyanın en iyi ürünlerini yapma, oyun değiştirici teknolojiler geliştirme ve ihracat odaklı büyüme hedeflerimizle ülkemize ve dünyanın dört bir yanındaki kullanıcılarımıza değer katan küresel bir markayız. title: Procurement Engineer
description: TEI has been a global design center and world-class manufacturer in the international arena, providing high-quality products and services to the aviation engines sector from 1985 to the present. We identify ourselves as the Source of Power as a result of this powerful position. We will continue to write success stories about our contributions to global aviation and the firsts we have brought to Turkey's aviation adventure. We strive for excellence in the following areas: engine assembly, testing and maintenance, repair, revision, engine design, and product development. Our company, which was formed in collaboration with Turkish Aerospace Industries, GE Aerospace, the Turkish Armed Forces Foundation, and the Turkish Aeronautical Association, provides the opportunity to contribute to the proud accomplishments of national projects and to sign the aviation stories of the future. On this journey, we draw our success not only from technology but also from our values: we build trust with justice, aim for excellence together, foster an inclusive environment, grow with an innovative perspective, and act with a strong sense of responsibility. One in every two aircraft in the sky has TEI parts. If you are planning unlimited development with extensive learning opportunities and aiming for a successful career with innovative and pioneering projects, join us today! #GücünOdağındaSenVarsın What Awaits You at TEI? Career Journey: Human and development-oriented practices are enhanced in career models. TEI Academy: A career path that consistently fosters technical and behavioral competencies, Social Clubs: A work environment that supports cultural diversity is fostered by clubs such as riding, diving, maritime and sailing, yoga, volleyball, and basketball, as well as Summer & Winter Tournaments. Wellbeing Activities: Dietician, Psychologist, Fit Bulletin, Seminar applications Working Model: Practices and models that are adaptable and promote work-life balance. Working Environment: A walking path, a market, a car wash and coffee areas are all part of the on-campus work environment. Benefits : You are able to apply for annual leave based on your total experience period, private health insurance including your spouse and children, take advantage of discounts on shopping and dining at various locations through the TEI Corporate Advantage Program and enjoy a flexible benefit reward application with TEIFLEX. Rewarding: The implementation of a reward system that encompasses many categories is determined by senior management or colleagues. What Do We Expect From You? Bachelor’s degree from an accredited universities in disciplines of Mechanical Engineering , Material & Metallurgical Engineering , Industrial Engineering, Aerospace-Aeronautical Engineering, Electrical and Electronics Engineering, Preferably 2 - 4 years’ experience of procurement bases, Experience in SAP ERP (or similar ERP programs), S4 Hana (asset), Certified associate program management certifications (PMI, CPP, CPPM) are asset, No travel restrictions (national & International), Proficiency in MS Office applications, Strong written and verbal communication skills in English, Strong team player with a collaborative mindset, Ability to effectively manage stakeholders through strong communication skills, Goal and result oriented working discipline, A mindset that supports continuous learning and personal development, Ability to quickly adapt to changing conditions with high emotional resilience, Strong data-driven, analytical, and objective decision-making skills, Currently residing in Eskişehir or willing to relocate, The Journey, Powered by You, Begins: Processing timely requisitions (RFI-RFQ) and purchase orders for consumable parts / COTS products / raw materials, Tracking orders, ensuring on-time deliveries, solving on time quality issues, Working with quality, material planning, R&D and process departments upon delivery to ensure orders are filled correctly and that goods meet specifications, Developing strong relationships with key suppliers and measure supplier’s performance based on quality, delivery, service level and like similar KPI’s, Communicating with supplier’s daily and organizing meetings and projects as needed to resolve supply issues or developing and finalizing any on-going projects to resolve supply issues, Working with other internal departments like planning, finance, contracts, sales and logistics to prevent or solve any issues and concerns, Contact with suppliers in case of non-quality/missing/damaged material or service issues, Sourcing for alternative sources for DOMESTIC and OEM projects. Our Recruitment Procedure By clicking on the link provided, you can obtain additional information regarding our recruitment process. https://kariyer.tei.com.tr/tr/gokyuzundeki-firsatlar You can get information about the details of personal data activities processed in our recruitment processes by accessing the clarification text by clicking the link below. https://www.tei.com.tr/kisisel-verilerin-korunmasi At our inspiring work environment, are you prepared to leave a permanent mark in the sky? title: GET Rotational Engineer
description: We supply the sustainable and innovative paints and coatings that our customers, communities – and the environment – are increasingly relying on. Our world class portfolio of brands – including Dulux, International, Sikkens and Interpon – is trusted by customers around the globe. We’re active in more than 150 countries and have set our sights on becoming the global industry leader. It’s what you’d expect from a pioneering paints company that’s committed to science-based targets and is taking genuine action to address globally relevant challenges and protect future generations. For more information please visit www.akzonobel.com. © 2023 Akzo Nobel N.V. All rights reserved. Job Purpose The Graduate Engineering Trainee (GET) development program opens the way to an international career in the Integrated Supply Chain area and prepares you to play key roles at AkzoNobel in managerial or experts’ positions. The GET program was created for engineers who are looking for opportunities to gain knowledge and experience in an international environment as to engineering career and after ready to take up professional challenges abroad. After completion of the first stage of the program in Turkey, you will be deployed to another factory within AkzoNobel in EMEA region. At the end of the graduate program, based on readiness and performance, you will be assigned a final role in discussion with the regional ISC organization and your coaches from your host sites. Qualifications We are looking for a Graduate Engineering Trainee in AkzoNobel-Marshall located in Dilovası. University degree in Mechatronic, Electrical & Electronics, Industrial and Chemical Engineering preferable universities. Eager to have a career in manufacturing and supply chain organization. Excellent communication & interpersonal skills Flexible and able to adapt to learn AkzoNobel methods and philosophy Excellent command of English Good knowledge of MS Office tools No restriction for travelling in and out of Country Willing to relocate to other countries on completion of the 24 months GET program. Willing to live in Kocaeli or İstanbul Asia Job Description Actively participates in process optimization and investment projects. Identifies improvement opportunities and designs solutions. Tracks and controls project budgets and timelines to ensure project completion within the approved limits. Monitors projects compliance to applicable codes, practices, QA/QC policies, performance standards and specifications. Cooperates and communicates daily with project members and stakeholders to interpret their needs and requirements and provides assistance and technical support. Uses of statistical analysis and appropriate business excellence project management processes to identify areas of significant improvement and develops plans to realize the benefits. Investigates root cause of process failures, develops solutions for non-conforming products and implements improvement plans. Uses data analysis and problem-solving methodologies to maximize plant and equipment effectiveness to achieve optimum life cycle cost of production equipment. We offer: 24-month development program (12 months in our factory in Turkey and the next 12 months of development in other AkzoNobel's factory in Europe). Opportunities to start career in multinational company and in different functional areas, such as Production, Engineering, Quality, Planning. Permanent job in one of the AkzoNobel's factories in EMEA, after successfully completing the GET program. Possibility of gaining knowledge through the practice. Mentoring and co-creating a diverse and supportive GET community in the EMEA region. Valuable work experience in multinational environment. Support in relocation. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, age or disability. Show more Show less

title: Project Engineer
description: Job Description Are You Ready to Make It Happen at Mondelēz International? Join our Mission to Lead the Future of Snacking. Make It With Pride. You assist in planning, developing and execution of capital projects, technical development, feasibility perspectives of engineering-related activities in the supply chain and capital-expense project execution to support growth, world-class manufacturing and productivity with the highest level of quality, safety and environmental requirements. You help ensure sure that Mondelēz business and innovation processes in project management and Mondelēz standards in execution are followed. How You Will Contribute The role supports capital project execution, and you will be accountable for the quality of the results and execution of capital projects using Mondelēz standards, and business and innovation processes in project management. You will help define and deliver the capital and technical agenda during the development phase of capital investments with stakeholders so that accurate budgets, plans and fit-for-purpose technical solutions are provided and develop the capital budget according to the contract and forecast cash flow. You will also help ensure that applicable engineering developments and standards are properly implemented, and support the development and implementation of state-of-the-art processes and equipment strategies to optimize resources, harmonize assets and rollout best practices. What You Will Bring A desire to drive your future and accelerate your career. You will bring experience and knowledge in: Engineering or operations Working effectively and under pressure to meet deadlines Analysis Project management Proposing and providing the best technical solutions for all processes undertaken. Performing pre-engineering and technical project management processes with cost calculations, expenditure planning, and CPS-time plans. Preparing capital allocation requests according to relevant guidelines and regulations and managing the approval processes (AR Request and Approval Processes). Ensuring investment projects are executed within the determined financial budget, in line with defined clear objectives and company procedures, and coordinating relevant project teams. Collaborating with the purchasing department to obtain and evaluate bids and present the most suitable technical solution proposal, ensuring cost-effective project solutions. Collaborating with the Purchasing and Legal departments for contract preparation, providing technical requirements and all relevant details. Recommending selected suppliers to the Purchasing Department to obtain the best technology. After AR approval, coordinating the design, procurement, installation, and commissioning processes of new equipment, ensuring the timely and vertically launched (VSU) commissioning of new technical equipment and building projects. To ensure project execution within the agreed timeline and budget, and to prepare all necessary reports within the area of responsibility and monitor the project implementation process. Coordinates the procurement, installation, and commissioning of new projects and equipment in collaboration with manufacturing and R&D. Ensures that project costs are monitored and reported in accordance with company guidelines and requirements. As the project leader, ensures that all meetings and necessary communications with the project team are conducted effectively and closely monitors the equipment and material procurement, testing, and shipment processes throughout all phases of the project. Takes proactive measures against potential delays and risks. Proposes and implements ideas to reduce inventory and costs, and to improve production volume and export potential. Together with the Business Development Manager, transforms business needs into engineering projects aimed at improving and increasing the efficiency of production processes in the facility/factory. Relocation Support Available? No Relocation support available Business Unit Summary We value our talented employees, and whenever possible strive to help one of our associates grow professionally before recruiting new talent to our open positions. If you think the open position you see is right for you, we encourage you to apply! Our people make all the difference in our succes Mondelēz International is an equal opportunity employer and all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, sexual orientation or preference, gender identity, national origin, disability status, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected by law. Excited to grow your career? We value our talented employees, and whenever possible strive to help one of our associates grow professionally before recruiting new talent to our open positions. If you think the open position you see is right for you, we encourage you to apply! IF YOU REQUIRE SUPPORT TO COMPLETE YOUR APPLICATION OR DURING THE INTERVIEW PROCESS, PLEASE CONTACT THE RECRUITER Job Type Regular Project Engineering Science & Engineering Show more Show less

title: Tedarik Zinciri Mühendisi
description: Özgün, cesur ve yenilikçi ROKETSAN, fark yaratan yerli ve milli ürünleriyle, küresel hedeflerine doğru ilerlemeye ve ülkemizin gururu olmaya devam ediyor. Türkiye’nin savunma gücüne yön veren projelerde yer alan ekibimizin bir parçası olarak, kariyer yolculuğunuzda fark yaratma fırsatı yakalayabilirsiniz Şirketimizin Ankara yerleşkelerinde görev alacak Tedarik Zinciri Mühendisi; proje planlama, üretim planlama, malzeme planlama ve tedarik planlama faaliyetlerinde aktif rol alacaktır. Beklenen Teknik Nitelikler Üniversitelerin Endüstri, Makine, Kimya, Metalurji ve Malzeme, Mekatronik ve Elektrik-Elektronik Mühendisliği bölümlerinden mezun, Tedarik Zinciri fonksiyonları hakkında bilgili, Tercihen; ERP sistemleri (özellikle Oracle) ve planlama yazılımları hakkında bilgi sahibi, Savunma sanayi, otomotiv veya havacılık sektörlerinden birinde deneyim sahibi. Görev ve Sorumluluklar Proje Planlama Sorumlusu olduğu projelerde teslimatların zamanında yapılabilmesi için tüm tedarik zinciri fonksiyonlarını koordine etmek, Hazırladığı periyodik rapor/sunumlarla, proje paydaşlarını ve üst yönetimi, projelerin güncel statüleri hakkında bilgilendirmek, Projelerdeki tedarik zinciri risklerini yönetmek. Üretim Planlama Sorumlusu olduğu üretim merkezlerinde kısa, orta ve uzun dönemli üretimleri planlamak/raporlamak, İş yükü ve kapasite analizleri yaparak üretim darboğazlarını belirlemek; yatırım ihtiyaçlarını tetiklemek, Üretim devamlılığı risklerini yönetmek. Malzeme Planlama Sorumlusu olduğu malzeme kategorilerinde malzeme ihtiyaç planı yapmak, malzemelerin satın alma taleplerini açmak, Envanter analizleri yapmak, farklı paydaşlara raporlandırmalar ve bilgilendirmeler yapmak, envanter yönetim politikaları belirlemek, Değişen koşullar altında talep gereksinim tarihlerini güncel tutmak. Tedarik Planlama Sorumlusu olduğu tedarikçilerin üretim süreçlerindeki darboğazları belirleyerek, tedarikçilerde kısa, orta ve uzun dönemli üretim ve malzeme ihtiyaç planlaması yapmak, Tedarikçilerin performanslarını izleyerek, analiz çıktılarına göre çalıştığı paydaş ekiplere (Satın Alma, Proje Planlama vb.) iyileştirme önerileri sunmak. Tedarikçilerdeki üretim devamlılığı risklerini yönetmek. Her fonksiyon için; ERP, PLM, Tedarikçi Portalı, İleri Planlama vb. yazılımları kullanarak Tedarik Zinciri süreçleri yönetiminde yer almak. ROKETSAN’ın denizlerin altından uzayın derinliklerine uzanan mühendislik faaliyetlerinde, millî teknoloji hedefleri doğrultusunda yürütülen çalışmalara katkı sunarak bu yolculuğun bir parçası olabilirsiniz. Yarın İçin Yüksel! Show more Show less

title: İş Analisti Stajyeri
description: Kızılay Yatırım ve ona bağlı grup şirketleri, Kızılay adına ‘sosyal etki yatırımcılığı’ yaparak, sektörlerinde Kızılay misyonuna uygun, kalıcı ve sürdürülebilir faaliyet gösterip gelir elde eder ve kazancının tamamını Kızılay’a aktarır. Kızılay Yatırım; insanı ve toplumu güçlü kılmak, afetlerin ve yoksulluğun oluşturduğu insan ıstırabını dindirmek üzerine kurulu olan temel varoluş amacını gerçekleştirmesi yolunda Kızılay’ın en büyük ve daimi destekçisidir. Kızılay Teknoloji bünyesinde istihdam edilmek üzere aşağıdaki görev ve sorumluluklarda çalışabilecek "İş Analisti Stajyeri" arıyoruz. Görev Tanımı ve Yetkinlikler Üniversitelerin Endüstri Mühendisliği bölümünde 3. ya da 4. Sınıfına devam eden, Haftanın en az 3 veya 4 günü devam edebilecek, SAP uygulamalarına ilgili olan ve bu alanda kariyer planı hedefleyen, İş akışlarının çizilmesi ve dokümantasyonu süreçlerinde aktif görev alacak, Proje yönetimine ilgili, Organizasyon ve zaman yönetimi kabiliyetleri yüksek olan, Gelişim odaklı, iletişimi ve motivasyonu yüksek, Takım çalışmasına yatkın, hızlı çözümler üretebilen, MS Office programlarını özellikle Excel ve Visio uygulamalarını iyi seviyede kullanabilen, İstanbul Ataşehir lokasyonuna ulaşım sorunu olmayan, İyi derecede İngilizce bilen. Show more Show less

title: Customer Analytics / Engagement Professionals
description: 🚀 Biz Kimiz & Neye İnanıyoruz? İnternet eşitsizlikleri ortadan kaldırıyor. Çünkü bilgiye, eğlenceye, eğitime, ticarete, nerdeyse her şeye, herkesin, her an, sınırsız erişimini sağlıyor. Herkesin üretmesini, paylaşmasını, kendini ifade etmesini mümkün kılıyor. Bu yüzden biz herkesin birinci sınıf bir interneti hak ettiğine inanıyoruz ve kendi almak istediğimiz internet hizmetini sunmak için çalışıyoruz. Sektörümüzde sık rastlanan kotaları, taahhütleri, akıl karıştıran teklifleri, kurnaz fiyatlama oyunlarını sevmiyoruz. Onun için yapmıyoruz. Merakın, yaratıcılığın, düş kurmanın gücüne inanıyoruz. Hayal ettiklerimizi hayata geçirmek için, hayatı basitleştirmek için, herkesi yapabilir kılmak için teknolojiyi çok iyi kullanıyoruz. Teknolojinin üstüne inancımızı, inadımızı, alın terimizi koyuyoruz. Fikir doğruysa, yapılamazlara, edilemezlere, o işler öyle yürümezlere aldırış etmiyoruz. Hız tutkunuyuz. Türkiye’nin en hızlı internetini sunuyoruz ve çok daha hızlısını yapmanın peşindeyiz. Yani bu daha başlangıç. Hız tutkumuz internet hızıyla sınırlı değil. Tüm işlerimizde hızın, çevikliğin, yüksek performansın peşindeyiz. Hayat zaten yeteri kadar karmaşık. Biz işleri basitleştirmeye çalışıyoruz. Dolambaçlı lafların, beyin yakan sözleşmelerin, şirket duvarlarının arkasına sığınmayı reddediyoruz. Bugün git yarın gel, biz biliriz sen bilmezsin, bizim çalışma şeklimiz değil. Bize böyle davranılmasını kabul etmiyoruz, kimseye de böyle davranmıyoruz. İyisiyle, kötüsüyle, doğrusuyla, yanlışıyla, cam gibi saydam olmaya çalışıyoruz. Müşterilerimizi de kendimiz gibi biliyoruz. Onların samimiyetlerine, iyi niyetlerine, dürüstlüklerine inanıyor; kendilerini ifade etmelerine, hayallerinin peşinde koşmalarına, üretmelerine katkıda bulunmak istiyoruz. Müşterilerimize mükemmel bir hizmet vermek, bu işin açık ara en iyisi olmak istiyoruz. Bizim sektörün bu konuda pek iyi olmadığını, bizim de daha gidecek çok yolumuz olduğunu biliyoruz. Bu hedefimize birlikte yürüyecek " Customer Analytics / Engagement Professionals " arıyoruz. 🍕Eğer bu sizseniz tanışmak çok isteriz. Gelin bu hedefe birlikte nasıl ulaşırız konuşalım. 👩 👨 Genel Nitelikler Üniversitelerin İstatistik, Yönetim Bilişim Sistemleri, Ekonomi, Endüstri Mühendisliği vb. bölümlerinden mezun Loyalty / CRM / Veri analitiği konularında minimum 4 yıl deneyim İleri seviye SQL bilen, tercihen Python veya R ile analiz yapabilen A/B test, segmentasyon, CLV, churn gibi temel pazarlama analitiği kavramlarına hakim Tercihen Salesforce, Insider gibi araçlarla çalışmış Analitik düşünme becerisi yüksek, sonuç odaklı ve iletişim yönü güçlü 💻 İş Tanımı Sadakat programlarının (puan sistemleri, üyelik seviyeleri vb.) tasarımı, yürütülmesi ve optimizasyonunda aktif rol almak Müşteri segmentasyonu, RFM analizi, kohort analizleri gibi yöntemlerle kullanıcı davranışlarını analiz etmek Sadakat kampanyalarının performans takibini yapmak, A/B testleri kurgulamak ve içgörüler üretmek Veri görselleştirme araçları ile iş birimlerine haftalık/aylık dashboard’lar hazırlamak Churn analizi, CLV tahmini ve kullanıcı yaşam döngüsü modellemeleri geliştirmek CRM ve pazarlama otomasyon ekipleriyle yakın çalışarak kişiselleştirilmiş kampanyalar geliştirmek 🚀 İşe Alım Sürecimiz Çok çeşitli geçmişlere sahip adayların başarılı olma fırsatına sahip olduğu, adil ve kapsayıcı bir deneyim yaratma hedefimiz bizi yönlendiriyor. Karmaşık bir işe alım süreci hayal etmiyoruz. Bu yüzden sürecin kısa, hızlı ve şeffaf olmasını önemsiyoruz. 1.Başvuru: LinkedIn üzerinden açık pozisyonlara başvuruda bulunabilirsin. 2.İlk Mülakat: Her şeyden önce becerilerini değerlendirmek ve TurkNet değerleriyle uyumlu olup olmadığını görmek istiyoruz. 3.Örnek olay: Bazı pozisyonlar için teknik beceriyi test etmemiz gerekebilir. 4.İkinci Mülakat: Lider(ler)imizle birlikte teknik becerilerini derinlemesine incelemek isteriz. 5.TurkNet'e hoş geldin! title: Denetim Uzmanı/Kıdemli Uzman (Bilgi Teknolojileri)
description: 2014 yılında kurulan Param , Bankacılık Düzenleme ve Denetleme Kurumu'ndan (BDDK) lisans alarak Türkiye'nin ilk lisanslı elektronik para kuruluşu oldu. Param grup şirketleriyle birlikte elektronik para, ön ödemeli kartlar, fiziksel, sanal ve cep POS sistemleri, e-cüzdan, issuing, acquiring, processing, BNPL, online tahsilat, açık bankacılık gibi çeşitli finansal teknoloji çözümleri ile hem bireysel hem de kurumsal müşterilerine uçtan uca hizmet veriyor. Avrupa İmar ve Kalkınma Bankası (EBRD), CEECAT Capital, Alpha Associates ve Revo Capital’ın katıldığı ilk turda 217 milyon dolar değerleme üzerinden yatırım alan Param, sektöründe öncü bir rol üstleniyor. Yolculuğumuza gücümüze güç katarak devam ederken, dinamik çalışma ortamımızın bir parçası olacak, heyecanını ve deneyimini bizlerle paylaşacak Denetim Uzman/Kıdemli Uzman arıyoruz. GENEL NİTELİKLER Üniversitelerin Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Elektrik-Elektronik Mühendisliği, Bilişim Sistemleri Mühendisliği, Endüstri Mühendisliği, İşletme Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği, Yönetim Bilişim Sistemleri vb. bölümlerinden veya denkliği yetkili makamlarca tanınmış yurtdışı üniversitelerin ilgili bölümlerinden mezun olmak, 4 yıldan az olmamak üzere; bilgi teknolojileri/bilgi sistemleri denetiminde tecrübeli olmak, İyi seviyede İngilizce bilmek, Erkek adaylar için askerlik görevini tamamlamış olmak, Ankara’da ikamet etmek veya edebilecek durumda olmak, Seyahat engeli bulunmamak, ISACA ITAF, COBIT, ITIL vb. çerçeveler ve BT yönetişim standartları hakkında bilgi sahibi olmak, Tercihen CISA, CISM, CRISC vb. sertifikalara sahip olmak. İŞİN TANIMI Şirket faaliyetlerinin Kanun ve ilgili diğer mevzuat ile şirket içi strateji, politika, ilke ve hedefler doğrultusunda yürütülüp yürütülmediğini belirlemek ve sistemlerin etkinliğini ve yeterliliğini değerlendirmek üzere denetimler yapmak, Tecrübe ve bilgisi doğrultusunda denetim süreçlerinin yürütülmesinde uygun roller almak ve gerekli durumlarda ilgili denetim ekibinin yönetilmesi ve koordine edilmesine yönelik sorumluluklar üstlenmek, Bilgi sistemleri yönetimine ilişkin faaliyetlerin politika, düzenleme ve genel kabul görmüş ilgili uluslararası standartlara uyumlu olup olmadığını değerlendirmek, Şirket bünyesindeki bilgi teknolojilerine bağlı süreçlere ve doğrudan bilgi sistemlerinin güvenliğine (gizlilik, bütünlük ve erişilebilirlik) yönelik denetimleri etkin ve katma değer yaratacak şekilde yürütmek, Bilgi Teknolojileri denetim ekiplerinde aktif şekilde yer almak ve aktif görev üstlenmek, Denetim ön çalışma, saha çalışması ve raporlama süreçlerindeki görev ve sorumluluklarını yerine getirmek, ekibi ve ekip liderini desteklemek, BT süreçlerine dair riskleri tespit etmek ve iç kontrol noktalarını değerlendirmek, Denetim çalışmaları kapsamında, denetim amacına uygun, sonuç almaya yönelik, tekrar edilebilir denetim testleri tasarlamak / uygulamak ve gerekli analizleri gerçekleştirmek, Excel, R, python vb. araçlarla verileri analiz etmek ve bu dillerde denetim/kontrol/analiz prosedürleri (kod parçaları ve/veya makrolar) oluşturmak, Denetim çalışma kağıtlarını ve raporlarını zamanında ve eksiksiz hazırlamak. Gerekli durumlarda İç Kontrol Birimi, Risk Yönetimi Birimi ve ilgili iş birimleriyle koordineli çalışmak, Denetim sonucunda Üst Yönetime/Denetim Komitesine sunulmak üzere zamanlı ve kaliteli raporlar hazırlamak, Denetim sonuçlarının, raporlarda yer alan bulguların, önerilerin ve aksiyon planlarının takibini yaparak izleme süreçlerini yürütmek, gerekiyorsa izleme saha testleri yapmak ve sonuçları raporlamak, İç Denetim Yönetmeliğinin oluşturulması ve güncel tutulması çalışmalarına katkı sağlamak, Kurumsal süreçlerle uyumlu ve kapsayıcı bir denetim evreninin oluşturulması çalışmalarına destek olmak, İç Denetim kaynaklarının katma değer yaratacak alanlarda etkin kullanımını sağlamak amacıyla gerçekleştirilen makro risk analizlerine katkı vermek, Risk analizi sonuçlarına ve Denetim Komitesi görüş ve talimatlarına dayalı denetim plan ve programlarının oluşturulmasına katkı sağlamak, Denetim plan ve programlarına uygun şekilde denetim faaliyetlerini icra etmek ve denetim raporlarının İç Denetim Yöneticisi aracılığıyla Denetim Komitesine sunulmasına yardımcı olmak, Denetim faaliyetlerini özellikle İç Kontrol Birimi ve Risk Yönetimi Birimi başta olmak üzere ilgili tüm birimlerle koordineli şekilde yürütmek, Dış denetim faaliyetlerinin koordinasyonunu sağlamak. Detaylar için; Ziyaret et: https://param.com.tr/ Bizi Linkedln’den takip et: https://www.linkedin.com/company/paramcomtr/ Bizi Instagram’dan takip et: https://www.instagram.com/param.com.tr/ Bizi X’den takip et: https://x.com/paramcomtr “Param’da seni bekleyen ayrıcalıklar!” 🚗 Yol Desteği 🍽️ Yemek Desteği 🏥 Sana Özel Sağlık Sigortası 🎂 Doğum Günü İzni 🎁 Welcome Kit 👋 Buddy Süreci 💻 ParamHub ile Eğitimler 🍹 Eğlence Molası 💳 ParamKart 🏆 Param’lının Avantajları 🌟 Referans Ödülü 📚 Karne ve İlk Okul Günü İzinleri 👶 Minik aile üyelerine 'hoş geldin' hediyesi! 🎙️ Söz Sende "6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu kapsamında işlenen kişisel verileriniz ile ilgili detaylı bilgilendirmeye https://hr.param.com.tr/tr/aydinlatma-metni adresinde yer alan aydınlatma metnimizden ulaşabilirsiniz." title: Gücün Kaynağında Kariyer - Havacı Kadınlar Uzun Dönem Staj Programı
description: Yenilikçi ve öncü projelerde yer alarak başarılı bir kariyer hedefliyorsan, uzun dönem staj programımız Gücün Kaynağında Kariyer tam sana göre! Üniversitelerin 4. sınıfında eğitimine devam eden ve kariyerine güçlü bir başlangıç yapmak isteyen kadın öğrencileri , uzun dönem staj programımız Gücün Kaynağında Kariyer programımıza bekliyoruz! Eğer iyi bir takım oyuncusuysan, analitik bir bakış açısına sahipsen ve yeteneklerini geliştirmek istiyorsan; Ar-Ge veya İnsan Kaynakları alanlarında deneyim kazanabileceğin Gücün Kaynağında Kariyer programımıza başvurunu gerçekleştirebilirsin. Geleceğin profesyonelleriyle birlikte üretmek ve gelişmek için seni de aramızda görmek istiyoruz. Eğer sen de: Üniversitelerin Makine Mühendisliği, Uçak Mühendisliği, Uzay Mühendisliği, Havacılık ve Uzay Mühendisliği, Endüstri Mühendisliği, Elektrik-Elektronik/Haberleşme Mühendisliği, Mekatronik Mühendisliği, Kontrol Mühendisliği, Malzeme/Metalurji Mühendisliği, Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği veya, İktisat, İşletme, İstatistik, Uluslararası İlişkiler, Siyaset Bilimi ve Kamu Yönetimi, Psikoloji, Sosyoloji, İletişim bölümlerinde öğrenciysen, 2025 - 2026 eğitim – öğretim döneminde 4.sınıfta öğrenim görüyorsan, Çok iyi derecede yazılı ve sözlü İngilizce biliyorsan, Milli projelerde gurur veren başarılara sahip olabilmek için Gücün Kaynağında Kariyer programımıza hemen başvur! Gücün Kaynağında Kariyer programında: Elektrik Elektronik Kontrol ve Gömülü Sistemler (Kontrol – Aviyonik – Donanım - Kablaj Tasarım Geliştirme - Yazılım Geliştirme - Yazılım Doğrulama) Malzeme ve Proses Geliştirme - Havacılık İtki Sistemleri için Malzemeler Mekanik - Yapısal Tasarım - Aerodinamik Tasarım, HAD ve Yanma - Gerilme ve Ömür Analizleri - Termal Sistemler ve Soğutma Sistem Mühendisliği - Sistem Entegrasyon - Sistem Emniyeti ve RMT - Uçuşa Elverişlilik ve Sertifikasyon - Validasyon – Enstrümantasyon - Motor Performans İnsan Kaynakları - Kurumsal İletişim Alanlarından birinde uzun dönem stajını yapabilirsin. Başvurunun Uygun Bulunması Durumunda Değerlendirme Sürecinde Seni Neler Bekliyor? Başvuru formu Genel yetenek – yabancı dil testi – video mülakat Teknik ve İK departman görüşmeleri Gücün Kaynağında Kariyer Programında Seni Neler Bekliyor? 11 ay boyunca ilham verici bir kampüste, çalışma arkadaşlarımızın ekiplerinde yer alarak iş hayatını deneyimleme, Kariyer gelişimini destekleyecek mentorluk programında yer alma, Kişisel ve profesyonel gelişimini destekleyen çeşitli eğitimlere katılma, Başarılı bir staj dönemi sonrası işe alım sürecine dahil olma fırsatı *LinkedIn üzerinden başvuru butonuna tıkladıktan sonra yönlendirileceğiniz sayfada başvurunuzu tamamlamanız gerekmektedir.Başvuru yalnızca form doldurulduktan sonra geçerli olacaktır. Aşağıdaki linke tıklayarak işe alım süreçlerimizde işlenen kişisel veri faaliyetlerine ilişkin detaylar hakkında aydınlatma metnine erişerek bilgi alabilirsin. https://www.tei.com.tr/kisisel-verilerin-korunmasi Gökyüzüne kalıcı bir iz bırakmaya var mısın? title: Future Squad Kısa Dönem Staj Programı 2026
description: Future Squad bildiğin staj programlarından değil! Çünkü Future Squad Staj Programı, sadece bir iş deneyimi değil; etki yaratmak demek! Gerçek projelerde yer almak, fikirlerinle fark yaratmak ve sınırsız gelişim fırsatlarıyla tanışmak demek. Sen de bu dünyanın bir parçası olmak istiyorsan hadi hemen başvurunu yap ve Future Squad’lı olma yolunda ilk adımını at! Future Squad Staj Programı’nda seni neler bekliyor? 2 ay sürecek staj deneyimi ile alanında uzman Yapı Kredi Teknolojililerden işin inceliklerini öğrenebilirsin. Gerçek bir deneyim kazanarak iş hayatına bir adım önde başlayabilirsin. Future Squad’a özel hazırlanan çok yönlü gelişim programlarıyla farklı yetkinlikleri geliştirebilir, yepyeni şeyler keşfedebilirsin. Staj sürecinde Yapı Kredi Teknoloji’de hangi pozisyonlarda yer alabilirsin? Yazılım Mühendisi Stajyeri İş Analisti Stajyeri Ar-Ge Mühendisi Stajyeri Güvenlik Mühendisi Stajyeri Network Mühendisi Stajyeri Sistem Mühendisi Stajyeri Süreç ve Proje Yönetimi Stajyeri UX – UI Design Stajyeri Yapay Zeka ve Veri Yönetişimi Stajyeri Peki biz senden neler bekliyoruz? Üniversitede Bilgisayar Mühendisliği, Yazılım Mühendisliği, Endüstri Mühendisliği, İşletme Mühendisliği, Matematik Mühendisliği, Elektrik ve Elektronik Mühendisliği bölümlerinde 3. veya 4. sınıf öğrencisiysen, İyi derecede İngilizce biliyorsan, Hem öğrenmekten hem de takım olarak üretmekten keyif alıyorsan, Keşfetmenin gücüne inanıyorsan Future Squad’lı olmanı dört gözle bekliyoruz! Future Squad’lı olmanın başka güzel yanları da var; 📖 Yapı Kredi Akademi ile sınırsız gelişim 💻 Uzaktan çalışma fırsatı 💼 Stajın ardından Yapı Kredi ve Yapı Kredi Teknoloji’de kariyer fırsatları 🍝 TokenFlex dijital yemek kartı 🐾 Yapı Kredi Gönüllüleri ile dahil olabileceğin sosyal sorumluluk projeleri 🏀 20 farklı spor dalında faaliyet gösteren Yapı Kredi Spor Kulübü 🎭 Yapı Kredililerin sosyal kulübü BizClub ile birçok kültür-sanat etkinliğine indirimli bilet alma fırsatı 💜7/24 ulaşabileceğin çalışan destek hattıyla, psikolojik, hukuki ve finansal alanlarda ücretsiz danışmanlık 🎂 Doğum günü izni 🏢 Koç Topluluğu Spor Kulübü, Koç Akademi eşliğinde Koçlu olmanın ayrıcalıklı dünyası, …ve çok daha fazlası! Hadi hemen başvurunu yap ve Future Squad’lı olma yolunda ilk adımını at! Süreç Adımları 1) Online Başvuru - Öz geçmiş değerlendirme 2) Online Değerlendirme - Genel Yetenek Testi - İngilizce Testi - Alan Tercihi & Teknik Test 3) Online Mülakat 4) Kişilik Envanteri 5) İlk İş Günü (6 Temmuz 2026) Hakkımızda Yapı Kredi Teknoloji olarak finans sektöründe yenilikçi, yüksek kaliteli ve katma değeri yüksek ürünler ve çözümler üreten bir teknoloji şirketiyiz. 2000’den fazla çalışanımızla, Yapı Kredi Bankası için sektöre yön verecek ürünler geliştiriyor, modern mimari sistemler ve bulut teknolojilerini kullanarak sınırları kaldıran teknolojilerin yeri olma yolunda ilerliyoruz. #BurasıGeleceğinBaşladığıYer Show more Show less

title: Process Engineer - Utilities & Tank Farm (GME) - Relocate to Saudi Arabia Permanent Expat Family Relocation Package
description: Please note that this role is based in Saudi Arabia on a permanent, residential basis. Job Req ID: 17355 Description Aramco energizes the world economy. Aramco occupies a special position in the global energy industry. We are one of the world’s largest producers of hydrocarbon energy and chemicals, with among the lowest Upstream carbon intensities of any major producer. With our significant investment in technology and infrastructure, we strive to maximize the value of the energy we produce for the world along with a commitment to enhance Aramco’s value to society. Headquartered in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, and with offices around the world, we combine market discipline with a generations’ spanning view of the future, born of our nine decades experience as responsible stewards of the Kingdom’s vast hydrocarbon resources. This responsibility has driven us to deliver significant societal and economic benefits to not just the Kingdom, but also to a vast number of communities, economies, and countries that rely on the vital and reliable energy that we supply. We are one of the most profitable companies in the world, as well as amongst the top five global companies by market capitalization. Overview We are seeking a Process Engineer with extensive hands-on expertise in Utilities processes to join our Operation Engineering Solutions Department (OESD) under Global Manufacturing (GM) Excellence Organization. OESD's technical team is responsible for providing high-quality, multi-disciplinary support to GM operating facilities (Refineries, NGLF, and petrochemical plants) within the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia and globally. Your primary is to provide in-depth process engineering and operations expertise to monitor, optimize, and drive performance improvement programs for Utilities, including both remote and on-site technical advisory support and benchmarking of utilities. Key Responsibilities As successful candidate you will be required to perform the following: Conduct regular performance reviews of existing Utilities through key performance indicators (KPIs) representing optimum operability, profitability, reliability, and process safety. Develop and present quarterly benchmarking reports with actionable improvement recommendations. Provide hands-on support in implementing performance improvement initiatives, demonstrating measurable results in closing identified gaps from quarterly benchmarking reports. Lead benchmarking and best practices exchange workshops among Global Manufacturing facilities (wholly-owned and affiliates) and facilitate knowledge sharing and continuous improvement. Deliver on-demand remote and field technical advisory support, including process design, troubleshooting, start-up/shutdown activities, and capacity test runs. Provide detailed service reports for each support activity, highlighting facility needs, actions taken, results, and lessons learned. Collaborate with Global Manufacturing facilities engineers to identify and implement cost optimization or process improvement initiatives, focusing on "low-hanging fruits" that require minimal capital investment, through operational adjustment or design modification. Conduct internal assessments on Utilities using Saudi Aramco engineering standard references and highlight any deviations or better standards applied by affiliates for endorsement to facility management or Saudi Aramco Central Engineering. Act as the overall coordinator for cascading and driving Global Manufacturing and Corporate programs for Utilities in operating facilities, enabling their execution and effective monitoring. Participate in Business Plan development, coordinate with stakeholders for capital investments on assigned Utilities and support techno-economic evaluations. Evaluate and recommend new Utilities technologies, coordinate with Central Engineering to facilitate field deployment. Minimum Requirements You will hold a Bachelor's degree in Chemical Engineering or related specialization. An advanced degree is preferred. You will have a minimum of 15 years of total Utilities unit experience (process engineering and operations) with at least 10 years of hands-on experience in handling refinery’s utilities. You will have experience in water desalination and boilers for steam generation You will be able to optimize various utility systems, with specific examples of performance improvements achieved. You will have in-depth knowledge of major equipment suppliers and package units for Utilities. You will have a proven track record of conducting technical troubleshooting, start-up, shutdown, and capacity test runs for utility systems. You will have strong proficiency in data analysis and visualization tools specific to Utilities performance metrics. You will also have strong management and coordination skills, with experience in stakeholder management. Working environment Our high-performing employees are drawn by the challenging and rewarding professional, technical and industrial opportunities we offer, and are remunerated accordingly. At Aramco, our people work on truly world-scale projects, supported by investment in capital and technology that is second to none. And because, as a global energy company, we are faced with addressing some of the world’s biggest technical, logistical and environmental challenges, we invest heavily in talent development. We have a proud history of educating and training our workforce over many decades. Employees at all levels are encouraged to improve their sector-specific knowledge and competencies through our workforce development programs – one of the largest in the world. Show more Show less

title: Process Engineer
description: About Us PHINIA: Advancing sustainability today, powering a cleaner tomorrow. PHINIA is an independent, market-leading, premium solutions and components provider with over 100 years of manufacturing expertise and industry relationships, with a strong brand portfolio that includes DELPHI®, DELCO REMY® and HARTRIDGE™. With over 12,500 employees across 43 locations in 20 countries, PHINIA is headquartered in Auburn Hills, Michigan, USA. At PHINIA, we Provide fuel systems, electrical systems, and aftermarket products and solutions of the highest quality — developed and manufactured responsibly — that are designed to enhance efficiency and reduce the environmental impact of vehicles, industrial machinery, and other applications. In doing so, we contribute to a cleaner tomorrow, treat our people and surrounding communities with respect, and hold ourselves accountable to robust ethical standards. Our Culture PHINIA promotes and cultivates an inclusive culture and diverse perspectives, strives to maintain its reputation for excellence, thrives on the power of collaboration, and fosters the development of our talented employees. We believe in making a positive impact through our business and actions, and we take our collective responsibility seriously. Career Opportunities We believe in building a brighter tomorrow for our employees as well as our customers and encourage you to learn about our long history, strong culture, new technologies, and future vision. We offer a strong local presence and interesting global opportunities. Join us on this shared journey toward a brighter tomorrow. Job Purpose KEY RESPONSIBILITIES Implement personal development and training plans for the technician team under their responsibility. Research and evaluate new technologies with potential for implementation. Achieve ME (Manufacturing Engineering) performance metrics. Prepare technical specifications for machines and equipment in line with company standards and required capacity and cycle time targets. Prepare process documentation (PFD, PFMEA, Control Plans, and Manufacturing Drawings) on time and at the required quality level. Use company project management tools in manufacturing engineering activities. Support quality, volume, cost, and continuous improvement projects by applying 6 Sigma, Shainin, and other problem-solving methodologies. Provide support for internal audits, customer visits, and certification audits. Manage prototype manufacturing of the product under their responsibility, and prepare lessons learned and gate charts. Manage process changes smoothly in compliance with company procedures. What We Offer We provide compensation and benefits programs intended to attract, motivate, reward, and retain an incredibly talented, globally diverse workforce at all levels within our organization. Our compensation programs are informed by market data and business needs, and we are committed to providing equitable and competitive compensation. We are committed to providing our team with quality and competitive benefit programs, including health and well-being resources, family-centric policies, and an agile workplace program, where not precluded by collective bargaining agreements or national statutory plans. Plans are benchmarked for competitiveness and value. We provide formal development opportunities at all levels and stages of employee careers. These opportunities are delivered in a variety of formats to make our portfolio of solutions agile, sustainable, and scalable to support our employees in developing the skills needed to succeed. What We Believe Product Leadership - Innovation that brings value to our customers Humility - Seeking out diverse perspectives and working collaboratively Inclusivity - Recognizing our differences makes us stronger; we are bold and intentional Net-Zero - Committed to energy efficiency, waste reduction and beneficial reuse Integrity - Taking responsibility for our decisions and doing what is right Accountability - Taking ownership of our actions and driving results SAFETY You will consistently hear us say Safety First! We are committed to continually improving our strong safety performance supporting the health and wellness of our employees! We also believe employee health and safety is everyone’s responsibility. We encourage safety learning and collaboration to help employees understand and follow applicable safety policies, standards, and procedures and identify opportunities to minimize or eliminate risk. Work is expected to be conducted in a manner that stresses the importance of preventing incidents and illnesses, including attending all required safety meetings and trainings. It is expected that all incidents, near misses, and unsafe conditions are immediately reported to the direct manager, Human Resources, or Safety Representative. EQUAL EMPLOYMENT OPPORTUNITY PHINIA is an equal employment opportunity employer such that all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, age, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity/expression, national origin, disability or protected veteran status. VISA SPONSORSHIP PHINIA does provide sponsorship for employment visa status based on business need. However, for this role, applicants must be currently authorized to work on a full-time basis, in the country where the position is currently based.
