title: Manufacturing Engineer
description: Who You’ll Work With This role reports to the Director, Manufacturing & Systems Engineering in EMEA and closely collaborates with the Product Risk Engineering, Senior Manufacturing Systems Engineering, and Advance Manufacturing Engineering teams to align and drive Nike’s strategic manufacturing goals and continuous improvement objectives and to support the adoption of advanced manufacturing technologies that enhances foundational capabilities and connect the dots. Who We Are Looking For We’re looking for a “ Manufacturing Systems Engineer 1” based in Istanbul, Turkiye . This is a key role within Nike’s Manufacturing Engineering team, responsible for driving the development and implementation of foundational capabilities in Quality, Lean, Industrial Engineering, and Garment Engineering, leading and ensuring alignment with Nike’s strategic manufacturing initiatives. Bachelor’s degree, minimum 3 years of experience in Manufacturing Systems Engineering or a related field, with a good foundation in Quality, Lean, Industrial Engineering, and Garment Engineering; Fabric Technologies, advanced degrees or certifications are preferred. Experienced in fabric development & production: including spinning, weaving, knitting, dyeing, finishing, printing – sublimation printing techniques and washing processes Proven leadership and management skills to inspire a team of engineers toward common goals and foster innovation. Good organizational and project management skills to manage multiple projects simultaneously, to focus on resolution and follow up on day-to-day issues, to foresee future problems, and take preventive action. Good communication and collaboration skills to work effectively across different teams and organizational levels. Thorough understanding of Apparel/Accessory process and how it relates to scheduling, manufacturing, and distribution, focusing on the impact on product/service quality. Solid understanding of manufacturing technologies and their application in enhancing operational quality and efficiency. Able to prioritize & direct people and projects through to completion, work with all levels of management and different groups. A fair understanding in implementing and sustaining Continuous Improvement Methodologies such as Lean Manufacturing and Six Sigma. A result-driven mindset with a focus on operational excellence, use data to influence decision making and drive continuous improvement. Good analytical and problem-solving skills, with a passion for optimizing manufacturing processes. Familiar with Microsoft Excel, Word, PowerPoint, and Outlook. Other collaborating or data analysis software are highly preferred. Proficiency in process engineering, with a track record of successful process improvement and optimization projects and proficiency in General Sewing Data (GSD) and background in factory capacity planning & management is a plus What You’ll Work On Leadership: You will take the initiative to develop and implement Quality, Lean, Industrial Engineering, and Garment Engineering principles within Nike’s manufacturing partner base to elevate their overall capabilities. Standards: You will liaise with Nike’s Product Risk Engineering team to deploy Nike’s product performance standards and lead the standardization of manufacturing processes, ensure consistency and efficiency across Nike’s APAC partner base. Manufacturing Readiness: You will leverage manufacturing integration, engineering tools, and best practices with quality/process engineering to mitigate risk at production. Manufacturing Execution: You will operate with world-class production quality engineering processes to ensure the perfect product is made right the first time. Inspections & Audits: You will reference quality measurement and verification of post-production materials and products, to make informed product decisions. Partner closely with internal and external Nike’s Stakeholders to ensure materials meet creative, functional and commercial requirements. Research and analyse global textile trends, market needs, new technologies/ processes, and consumer preferences to inform and drive fabric innovation. Close-monitor seasonal fabric development KPI’s and cross-brand discipline on number of seasonal developments, fabric testing and risk assessment to follow & to set Nike Standards in consideration with regulatory compliance requirements. Ensure Nike Sustainability Targets are met through material innovation, supplier collaboration, fiber and fabric innovators. Closely cooperate with product development teams to create/select/use appropriate materials and providing technical support during the development and production stages. Monitor and support sustainable material initiatives (GRS, BCI, ZDHC etc) Issue Management: You will collaborate with Nike’s Issue Management team to conduct comprehensive review, analysis, and resolution of product issues; you will lead the root cause investigation and Corrective and Prevention action (CAPA) follow-up for continuous improvement at the factory and build a culture of quality. Marketplace Feedback: You will incorporate consumer feedback based on in-market product quality, and lessons applied to future product/manufacturing improvements. As part of the role, you will establish and track performance metrics to assess the impact of implemented initiatives on manufacturing outcomes. Show more Show less

title: Overseas Technical Procurement Engineer
description: İGA Istanbul Airport, The largest infrastructure project in the history of the Republic of Türkiye, began operations on October 29, 2018. Türkiye’s gateway to the world , the airport continues its operations as a significant global hub , connecting the Asian, African, and European continents. Built on an area of 76.5 million square meters, the airport has a terminal serving 90 million passengers, with a planned total capacity of 200 million. İGA Istanbul Airport, honored by Skytrax as the “Best Airport of 2023,” “World’s Best Airport Shopping Experience,” and “Most Family-Friendly Airport,” and by ACI as Europe’s “Best Airport Over 40 Million Passengers,” “Most Enjoyable,” and “Cleanest,” continues to set global standards. At İGA, we believe every individual is unique, yet united by a shared vision and passion. Guided by our strategic goals and strong work ethic, we strive to move forward every day.If you aspire to be part of this proud and unique journey, we are looking for a talented ‘’Overseas Technical Procurement Engineer’’ to join us at the “meeting point” of the world. Your Journey Begins With a Unique Role ✈️ Conduct market research for machinery, equipment and spare parts procurement in domestic and international markets and develop the most suitable solutions based on organizational needs, Establish and develop relationships with domestic and international suppliers, Collect quotations, conduct technical and commercial evaluations and analyses, Lead supplier negotiations and finale contract processes, Monitor customs and foreign trade processes, manage import and export operations in compliance with legal regulations, Manage purchase and procurement processes via SAP, Prepare cost analyses and reports to provide data-driven insights. Proudly Show Your Skill to the World 🌍 Bachelor’s degree in Engineering or a related field (preferably Mechanical Engineering or Industrial Engineering), Experience in machinery, equipment, and spare parts procurement processes, Knowledge of foreign trade and import operations and familiarity with related processes. Proficient in research and procurement processes in international markets, Knowledgeable about foreign trade regulations and customs processes, Experience in quotation analysis, supplier negotiation and contract management Excellent command of MS Office and SAP programs, Advanced level of competency in English, Willing to engage in communication and sharing among colleagues, Always setting the bar higher for oneself and the team with a continuous improvement mindset, What Awaits You in İGA 💎 You can benefit from Private Health Insurance, You can enjoy the privileges of your foreign language skills with Foreign Language Allowance! The İGA family is growing more with your inclusion, and our little İGA members can benefit from daycare support until they reach 68 months-old! You can benefit from many different stores and services provided at İGA Istanbul Airport! You can benefit from discounted prices and privileges through our collaborations with many leading brands! You can enjoy a variety of delicious meals in our cafeterias at the Airport and İGA Campus! With İGA Academy, which has won numerous awards globally, you can participate in many programs supporting your individual and career development both domestically and/or internationally! Our shuttles are waiting for you within a maximum distance of 1 km! With a total of 12,000 users and 300 service vehicles, you can benefit from our service network reaching all points of Istanbul except for the Adalar and Şile! At İGA, you can interact with colleagues who share your passions and interests, become part of our vibrant social clubs and create memories beyond the workplace! You can win surprise gifts through various contests and draws, With the orientation program at İGA, along with the support of your Buddy, you can learn and grow to feel in a unique experience! Celebrate your new age with joy at the monthly organized birthday parties at İGA! With the privileges provided by İGA Pass, you can have a unique pre-flight experience! You can explore it beforehand by clicking here now: https://www.igapass.com/tr İGA is inclusive with all its diverse colors. Coming from different cultural backgrounds and having unique competencies; the comfort of our colleagues who stand against obstacles is more precious than anything! Your personal data, which you will convey through LinkedIn, is processed within the scope of the Personal Data Protection Law for the purposes specified in the Information Text that can be accessed via this link : " https://www.igairport.com/tr/insan-kaynaklari/kariyer-firsatlari ." The processed personal data is limited to the data you share only. By applying for the relevant job posting, you approve that your resume, when submitted, will be processed for the purposes stated in the Information Text, and if a suitable position opens, it may be transferred to the Company's group companies and business partners, and may also be processed by these companies for the purpose of recruitment. title: Project Engineer
description: Job Responsibilities 1. Conduct site surveys, construction drawing reviews, and material verification/management for overseas projects, and establish standardized technical documentation in compliance with project requirements. 2. Responsible for monitoring and guiding third-party installation teams in the mechanical installation of equipment, completing the installation, parameter optimization, and joint debugging of electrical systems to ensure compliance with delivery standards. Also supports project management work to guarantee the project is accepted on time and meets quality requirements. 3. Serve as the primary technical liaison between clients, partners, and internal teams. Conduct regular communications on project progress and service updates to ensure information transparency. 4. Deliver product operation and maintenance training to clients. Provide on-site production support as needed, and perform after-sales service work such as equipment operation and maintenance, troubleshooting, hotline response and technical guidance in accordance with contract requirements. 5. Strengthen on-site client relationships to continuously improve customer satisfaction. 6. Timely handle and accurately execute other work tasks assigned by departments and superiors. Qualifications 1. Academic background in Mechatronics or Electrical Engineering. 2. Valid electrician license (construction/maintenance type is preferred) with more than 2 years of experience in mechatronic equipment troubleshooting and repair. 3. Proficiency in interpreting electrical schematics, skilled in operating test instruments, and familiar with PLC programming (e.g., Siemens S7-1200/1500). 4. Excellent problem-solving skills, customer requirement - oriented mindset, ability to optimize workflows proactively. 5. Flexible and efficient teamwork ability, strong time management skills, able to accept urgent tasks and strictly abide by safety regulations. 6. English proficiency as a working language, readiness for international business travel, and familiar with cross-cultural communication skills. Show more Show less

title: Lead Site Sourcing Engineer
description: Job Description Summary Negotiate with dedicated providers according to specific policies. Achieve the best contractual conditions while also ensuring internal customer satisfaction. Has knowledge of best practices and how own area integrates with others; is aware of the competition and the factors that differentiate them in the market Job Description Roles and Responsibilities Defining and Implementing sourcing actions for assigned portfolio, to optimize cost, quality and delivery of products, in line with Global & Plant Strategies and contractual obligations. Lead negotiations and allocate needs to specific suppliers. Negotiate terms and conditions (price, payment terms, incoterms, warranty, logistic requirements) with suppliers according to Customer needs and requirements and transmit information to Procurement, Driving budget for assigned commodities and managing sourcing activities, launches sourcing tenders, by implementing all sourcing steps from market analysis to successful execution, consist of RFI technical & commercial concept evaluation, risk & opportunities calculation, negotiation, awarding, contract signature with final agreed supplier. Monitors the execution process in cooperation with Supply chain team to make sure you are successful. Establish and maintain productive relationships with Internal stakeholders, and vendors/ forwarders. Managing claims. Includes commercial sourcing management such as data analysis, negotiations support, etc. Searching for new suppliers / materials / technologies locally/globally; carrying out supplier selection steps i.e. Supplier Assessment and SRG auditing. Negotiating agreements/contracts with suppliers Propose & implement cost reduction actions by using cost models to validate commodity strategies and to understand significant cost drivers. Providing analysis on market, new products, newcomers, legal constraints, etc Follow up supplier quality performance and development plans and manage supplier claims. Collaborating with the Global Sourcing Team, Global Commodity Leaders and peers involved in other Sourcing initiatives. Required Qualifications Bachelor’s degree from an accredited university in engineering fields Minimum 5 years of experience in sourcing & supply chain area Strong negotiation skills & terms and conditions knowledge, setting up a contract structure and contract management Experience with an ERP system Strong verbal and written skills in English and native speaking skills in Turkish The ability to travel domestically; less than 10% Willing to work at Gebze plant at least 4 days per week Ability to live in Istanbul & Kocaeli Desired Characteristics Prior experience working with SAP is a plus Team player, results-oriented and ability to learn fast Customer oriented approach and ready to engage with users Strong oral and written communication skills with different levels Demonstrated ability to analyze and resolve complex problems Ability to document, plan, market, and execute programs Established project management skills Additional Information Relocation Assistance Provided: No Show more Show less

title: Kalite Yönetim Sistemi Sorumlusu
description: EMS Erhan Makina, taşıma araçları imalatı alanında faaliyet gösteren, müşteri odaklı yaklaşımı ve sürekli iyileştirme anlayışıyla üretim yapan bir mühendislik firmasıdır. Kaliteyi yalnızca bir belge değil, üretim süreçlerinin ayrılmaz bir parçası olarak gören firmamız; ISO standartlarına uygun, sürdürülebilir ve disiplinli bir yönetim anlayışını benimsemektedir. Kalite yönetim sistemleri süreçlerinde görev alacak, üretimle iç içe çalışacak ve uzun vadede kalite yapımızın gelişimine katkı sağlayacak Kalite Sistemleri Sorumlusu arayışımız bulunmaktadır. Görev ve Sorumluluklar ISO kalite yönetim sistemleri kapsamında süreçlerin yürütülmesi ve takibi İç ve dış denetimlere hazırlık süreçlerinin planlanması ve koordinasyonu Kalite sistemleri kapsamında dokümantasyon, veri ve kayıt yönetiminin eksiksiz yürütülmesi Üretim süreçlerini, makineleri ve iş akışlarının sahada gözlemlenerek kalite sistemlerine entegre edilmesi Proseslere ilişkin iyileştirme fırsatlarının tespit edilmesine destek olunması Kalite sistemi gereklilikleri doğrultusunda ilgili diğer birimlerle koordineli çalışılması Aranan Nitelikler Makine Mühendisliği, Otomotiv Mühendisliği, Endüstri Mühendisliği veya benzeri mühendislik bölümlerinden mezun Kalite sistemleri konusunda öğrenmeye istekli İngilizce okuma ve yazma becerisine sahip Bilgisayar ve ofis programlarını (özellikle Word, Excel) çok iyi düzeyde kullanabilen Dokümantasyon ve belge yönetimi konusunda titiz, düzenli ve sistematik çalışan Üretim ortamında aktif görev alabilecek, sahayı öğrenmeye istekli Öğrenmeye açık, gelişim odaklı ve uzun vadeli çalışma hedefi olan Yeni mezun adaylar değerlendirilecektir (üniversite döneminde staj veya iş deneyimi tercih sebebidir) Etimesgut, Eryaman, Sincan bölgelerinde ikamet eden adaylar tercih sebebidir Neden EMS Erhan Makina? Güçlü bir oryantasyon eğitimi ve kalite çalışmalarını sahada uygulama fırsatı Yeni mezunlar için güçlü bir öğrenme ve gelişim ortamı Uzun vadeli kariyer planlaması Disiplinli, sistematik ve mühendislik temelli çalışma kültürü Show more Show less

title: BASF Coatings Customer Order Management Uzun Dönem Stajyer
description: GENEL NİTELİKLER VE İŞ TANIMI Dünyanın lider kimya şirketlerinden BASF Coatings Boya Ataşehir ofisinde, Nisan 2026 itibariyle göreve başlayacak ve öğrencilik durumu minimum Haziran 2027’ye kadar devam eden “Uzun Dönem Stajyer” arayışımız mevcuttur. Genel Nitelikler Üniversitelerin Dış Ticaret, Lojistik, Endüstri Mühendisliği, Kimya Fakültelerinde Lisans öğrenimi minimum Haziran 2027'ye kadar devam eden, Tedarik Zinciri alanında kendini geliştirmek isteyen, MS Office Programlarını iyi derecede kullanabilen (Word, Excel, Powerpoint vb.), İyi derecede İngilizce yazılı ve sözlü iletişim bilgisine sahip, Haftanın en az 4 günü ve mezun olana kadar stajına düzenli olarak devam edebilecek, İstanbul Anadolu yakasında ikamet eden, Analitik düşünme yeteneğine sahip, öğrenmeye ve ekip çalışmasına açık, iletişimi kuvvetli uzun dönem stajyer arayışımız mevcuttur. İş Tanımı Satış raporlarına ve sunumlarına destek vermek Sipariş yönetimine destek olmak Ekip aktivitelerinde etkin rol ve sorumluluk almak Müşterilere malzeme güvenlik bilgi formu (MSDS), teknik bilgi formu (TDS) vb. belgeleri göndermek Müşterileri ürün ve ambalajlarla ilgili değişikliklerden düzenli olarak haberdar etmek Ekip gönderilerine destek vermek Bölüme özel bazı sistemleri etkin biçimde kullanabilmek (müşteri portalları ve EC spesifik portallar) Önemli Not Sadece yukarıda belirtilen kriterlere uygun adaylarla görüşülecektir. Görüşmeler online olarak yapılacaktır. Staj için fiziki katılım gerekecektir. Telefon mülakatı için +49’lu (Almanya kodlu) numaradan gelen çağrının kabul edilmesini rica ederiz. Show more Show less

title: Ücret ve Yan Haklar Uzman Yardımcısı
description: Kurumumuzun ücret ve yan haklar süreçlerinin yürütülmesine destek olacak; veri hazırlama, analiz ve raporlama çalışmalarında görev alacak Ücret ve Yan Haklar Uzman Yardımcısı arıyoruz. Bu pozisyonda görev alacak kişi, ücret analizleri ve veri kontrolleri kapsamında ilgili ekiplerle koordineli çalışarak süreçlerin doğru ve zamanında yürütülmesine katkı sağlayacaktır. Görev ve Sorumluluklar • Ücret ve yan haklar süreçlerine yönelik veri hazırlama, analiz ve raporlama çalışmalarına destek olmak, • Operasyonel süreçlerin takibini yapmak ve ilgili ekiplerle koordinasyon sağlamak, • Ücret analizleri ve veri kontrollerini gerçekleştirmek, • Raporların hazırlanmasına destek olmak • Süreçlerin zamanında ve hatasız yürütülmesine katkıda bulunmak. Aranan Nitelikler • Üniversitelerin Endüstri Mühendisliği veya İktisadi ve İdari Bilimler Fakültesi bölümlerinden mezun, • 0–1 yıl deneyimli veya yeni mezun, • İyi seviyede Excel bilgisine sahip, • Analitik düşünme becerisi güçlü. Tercih Sebepleri • İnsan kaynakları, ücret ve yan haklar süreçlerinde staj veya proje deneyimi, • İş süreçleri ve operasyon yönetimi konularına ilgi. Show more Show less

title: Manufacturing Engineer - Painting & Automation
description: Unlock Your Potential at Eaton: Where Diversity Drives Innovation. No matter where you come from, your aspirations matter to us. We believe in the power of different perspectives, experiences, and backgrounds to ignite innovation and drive success. We're in the business of empowering people, and that includes you. Your journey here is not just about a job; it's about a shared vision for a brighter, more sustainable future. Our site in Ankara offers a fantastic learning environment and a vibrant array of career opportunities spanning medium-voltage product design, manufacturing, and sales. Combining agile R&D with internationally recognized test facilities, our team has the resources, speed, and flexibility to adapt to any customer demand. We support utility providers and renewable energy projects, as well as commercial and residential buildings, with innovative and cost-effective solutions. We aspire to be an all-encompassing medium-voltage center of excellence. Our team is currently growing fast as we ramp up our ability to support crucial trends like Industry 4.0, electrification, and the energy transition. Our work is enabling more agile and energy-efficient manufacturing, as well as driving forward electrification and the transition to smarter power grids dominated by renewables — helping to create a more sustainable future. Our employees are passionate about continuously improving and reaching their full potential, as well as enabling our facility to do the same. We’re always seeking dedicated and adaptable people with skills spanning engineering, sales, marketing, R&D, and manufacturing. If you’re curious and love innovating to solve new challenges, join us! We are looking for a Manufacturing Engineer - Painting & Automation to be joining our team in the Transformer Business Unit. This role is based on site in Temelli. The Manufacturing Engineer plays a critical role in driving operational excellence across Eaton’s Ankara facility. This position supports the development and optimization of manufacturing processes, contributes to new product introductions (NPI), and leads continuous improvement initiatives. Key Responsibilities Process Optimization & Continuous Improvement Analyze and improve manufacturing processes to reduce waste, cycle time, and setup duration Apply Lean, Six Sigma, and TPM methodologies to enhance productivity and standardization Lead root cause analysis and implement mistake-proofing solutions using tools like 8D, A3, DOE, and 5-Why Support for New Product Introduction (NPI) & Strategic Projects Participate in the industrialization of new products using Eaton’s NPI framework Contribute to Strategic Transfer Projects (STP) and Value Analysis/Value Engineering (VAVE) initiatives Ensure manufacturability through Design for Manufacturing (DFM) principles and accurate cost modeling Manufacturing Technology & Digital Transformation Support implementation of CAD/CAM systems, NC programming, and inspection tools Assist in layout optimization using simulation tools and contribute to Industry 4.0 initiatives Evaluate and recommend new technologies aligned with capital investment strategies Safety, Quality & Compliance Promote and adhere to safety standards including lockout/tagout and ergonomic practices Participate in PFMEA reviews and implement robust error-proofing methods Ensure compliance with Eaton’s quality policies and environmental regulations Cross-Functional Collaboration Work closely with operations, supply chain, and quality teams to resolve issues and improve performance Provide technical support during customer visits and internal audits Contribute to capacity planning and layout improvements to support plant growth Deploy Eaton Business System and Eaton Continuous Improvement System tools to drive performance improvement and knowledge development. Qualifications Bachelor’s Degree in Electrical, Mechanical, Materials, or Industrial Engineering (or equivalent). 5 years of professional applied experience in Transformers / Switchgear Manufacturing / Engineering Services. A minimum of 3–5 years of experience in manufacturing engineering or operations with exposure to painting technology and automation. Experience in transformer or switchgear manufacturing preferred. Familiarity with DFMEA, PFMEA, DFM, PPAP, and controlled processes. Exposure to ISO 9001, ISO 14001, AS9100, or QS 9000 standards is a plus. Proven experience with Lean and Six Sigma tools. Strong analytical and problem-solving abilities. Experience with CAD/CAM systems and manufacturing simulation tools. Knowledge of Industry 4.0 technologies and digital workflows. Results-driven with a continuous improvement mindset. Strong communicator with the ability to present technical ideas clearly. Collaborative team player who thrives in cross-functional environments. Adaptable, optimistic, and proactive in facing challenges. Fluent level of English language is required, due to the international exposure. What We Offer Competitive compensation and benefits package Challenging projects in dynamic collaborative team We make your aspirations matter – Eaton encourages internal promotion, whenever possible We make your growth matter - We invest in our employees for the long term – not just with salary and benefits, but with ongoing learning and development opportunities made available through Eaton University We make your contributions matter - reliability, safety, efficiency, and sustainability are at the core of our dedication to improving people’s lives and the environment through power management technologies. We make your wellbeing matter – We put your health and safety first. Wellness at Eaton is more than a program, it’s about changing the environment by offering the right tools to help empower employees to make that happen. We are committed to ensuring equal employment opportunities for job applicants and employees. Our recruitment processes use balanced selection criteria and avoid unlawful discrimination against applicants on the basis of their age, colour, disability, marital status, national origin, gender, gender identity, genetic information, race or racial origin, religion, sexual orientation or any other status protected or required by law. Show more Show less

title: Konya IC Factory Process Engineer
description: Looking for Your Dream Job? Join The Magnum Ice Cream Company! Konya IC Factory Process Engineer Function : Supply Chain Reports to: Production Manager | Supply Chain IC SU Konya IC Scope: Local Location: Konya IC Terms & Conditions: Full Time The Ice Cream division at Unilever is preparing to stand on its own, aiming to become an independent, EUR 8.3 billion publicly listed company by the end of 2025. We’re on a mission to create the ultimate snacking company. A place where growth, innovation, founder and ownership mentality, and performance are cultivated and rewarded. And where we craft extraordinary ice cream experiences - transforming ordinary moments into lasting memories. Because we know, life tastes better with ice cream. ABOUT THE MAGNUM ICE CREAM COMPANY: The Magnum Ice Cream Company is all about growth. Growing our business. Growing our customers’ businesses. Growing our people’s careers. Growth begins with empowerment. So we free our people to be innovative, responsible entrepreneurs, driven and equipped to give our consumers more amazing products and unforgettable moments – and having fun doing it. With 19.000 expert ice cream colleagues and iconic brands like Wall’s, Cornetto and Ben & Jerry’s, loved in 76 countries, we are the world’s largest Ice Cream company leading the industry. We have been taking pleasure seriously for more than 100 years, serving happiness with every lick or scoop of ice cream for generations. We are investing to unlock the full growth potential of The Magnum Ice Cream Company as a standalone entity, once we separate from Unilever, which is planned to happen before the end of 2025. We dream big but keep things simple to act fast. If you want to grow with us, make an impact, and shape the future of Ice Cream , this is the place for you! JOB PURPOSE Here is the place where you can bring your purpose to life with the work that you do – creating a better business and a better world. A Great Supply Chain is the key winning formula for every day's business world and supply chain is the spine of success in every company. If you are looking for a job where you will find a delightful combination of strategy, creativity and execution that changes the score of the game by creating value. If you are looking for team members with passion for success, ability and will to make use of change and to always win. We are an organization growing proudly with real value creation. Join us to add your mark to the list of “Made by You”. We are looking for a Process Engineer to work in our Factory located in Konya. WHAT WILL YOUR MAIN RESPONSIBILITIES BE Using engineering tools and analysis programs. Solving the process issues that causes loss of effectiveness through engineering way of working. Developing and define the working parameters for the processes. Focusing on development for error proof and full proof methodologies to eliminate the need for alignment and adjustment. Responsible for safety in the area and the occupational health of people work with. Taking responsibilities in design phase for new projects or any improvements. Responsible to put comments as supply chain part. Participate in conducting trial and industrial tests of new types of packaging materials, raw materials and finished products. Supporting innovation network meetings for new product launches in terms of technical know-how. Propose saving projects. Participating in projects to upgrade existing equipment, as well as purchase new ones. Participating / leading improvement projects, study WCM tools and apply them in practice in improvement projects. Identifying the causes of equipment malfunctions or defects. If necessary, take part in the repair, installation, dismantling, testing and adjustment of particularly complex units of equipment (units and machines) in cooperation with maintenance. Participating in the training of production operators. Developing and maintaining a reporting system and working documentation regarding the production process functionality. Developing and supporting production team to create and update WCM activity boards. Advising and supporting in cooperation with WCM coordinator, production staff on the application of WCM techniques. Participating in conducting internal meetings aimed at developing measures to prevent and eliminate non-conformities and reduce losses. Responsible for the validation of all process improvements and the establishment of revised basic conditions on the line. A core deliverable is to eliminate losses and wastes and increase the stability of the line to support the transition of traditional line teams to semi-autonomous teams. Experiences & Qualifications WHAT YOU WILL NEED TO SUCCEED University degree preferably in Mechanical Engineering Engineering with a strong understanding of manufacturing processes, safety, productivity and quality assurance. Ability of handling several projects simultaneously and meeting tight deadlines. Working effectively with different departments. Proficiency in MS Office applications Preferably no military obligation for male candidates. Skills Fluent in English & Turkish Good communication skills. Analytical thinking skills. Problem solving skills. Leadership You are energized by delivering fantastic results. You are an example to others – both your results and your resilience. You are constantly on the lookout for better ways to do things, engaging and collaborating with others along the way. As an individual you are the one responsible for your own wellbeing and delivering high standards of work. You must also focus on the Consumer and what they need. You are humble and have your head up, looking around to interpret evidence and data smartly, spot issues and opportunities to make things better. WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT: A unique mix of global scale & start-up spirit—€8.3bn powerhouse with an agile, entrepreneurial mindset. We’re building a new high growth Ice Cream company from the ground up. Career without limits—42 markets, international opportunities, and fast tracked growth. A performance-driven culture—Freedom to act, disrupt and grow – your success is measured by impact. title: İK İş Ortağı
description: Prometeon Turkey Endüstriyel ve Ticari Lastikler A.Ş. is a high-profile multinational group engaged in Tyres Sector. We are willing to work with professionals who want to make a career in Prometeon. Location will be in Kocaeli/Kartepe. The candidate will support the team in the following activities: Qualifications • Bachelor’s degree in a relevant field (Business Administration, Industrial Engineering, Economics, Psychology, Labor Economics, etc.) • Minimum 3–5 years of experience in Human Resources, preferably as an HR Business Partner • Experience in white-collar and intern recruitment processes end-to-end • Experience in internal communication and employee engagement process • Knowledge of performance and talent management • Experience in Employer Branding activities and Young Talent programs • Strong communication skills with the ability to build effective relationships across all levels of the organization • Ability to analyze business needs and provide proactive HR solutions • Strong planning, organization and time management skills • Results-oriented mindset with strong problem-solving capability • Fluency in English • Proficient in MS Office applications • Knowledge of SAP HR is an asset • Capability of new digital tools and desire to learn Main Responsibilities • Act as the first point of contact for assigned functions (Sales, Marketing, Purchasing, Logistics, ICT, Finance and HR) and serve as a strategic HR Business Partner • Analyzing specific needs taken from employees correctly and finding solutions, ultimately increasing employee satisfaction • Support the company’s mission, vision, increase employee motivation and engagement in line with the needs of the organization and beliefs. • Support performance and talent management processes in coordination with L&D and related stakeholders • Lead and implement Employer Branding activities to increase employer brand awareness and Young Talent Internship programmes • Working in coordination with Compensation & Benefits processes about salary offer preparation of new comers. • Support organizational development initiatives, including role definitions and responsibility frameworks • Prepare and monitor regular HR KPI reports (Employee Engagement, Performance Management, Recruitment Time, Turnover, Employer Brand Awareness) • Ensure compliance with applicable Quality Management Systems (ISO standards and related requirements) • Collaborate with regional/country HR teams to ensure functional alignment Required Competencies • Effective communication and relationship management • Planning and time management • Problem-solving mindset • Result-oriented approach • Teamwork and collaboration • Negotiation skills • Coaching mindset • Internal customer focus • Innovative and creative perspective Prometeon Tyre Group manufactures and sells tyres, especially for industry, transport of goods and passengers, and AGRO and OTR applications. title: Manufacturing Excellence Intern
description: Looking for Your Dream Job? Join The Magnum Ice Cream Company! Manufacturing Excellence Intern Location: Corlu Scope: Local The Magnum Ice Cream Company (formerly a division of Unilever) is now a standalone, independent, EUR 7.9 billion publicly listed company. We’re on a mission to create the ultimate snacking company. A place where growth, innovation, founder and ownership mentality, and performance are cultivated and rewarded. And where we craft extraordinary ice cream experiences - transforming ordinary moments into lasting memories. Because we know, life tastes better with ice cream. ABOUT ICE CREAM: Life Tastes Better With Ice Cream The Magnum Ice Cream Company is all about growth. Growing our business. Growing our customers’ businesses. Growing our people’s careers. Growth begins with empowerment. So we free our people to be innovative, responsible entrepreneurs, driven and equipped to give our consumers more amazing products and unforgettable moments – and having fun doing it. With 19.000 expert ice cream colleagues and iconic brands like Wall’s, Cornetto and Ben & Jerry’s, loved in 76 countries, we are the world’s largest Ice Cream company leading the industry. We have been taking pleasure seriously for more than 100 years, serving happiness with every lick or scoop of ice cream for generations. We are investing to unlock the full growth potential of The Magnum Ice Cream Company as a standalone entity, once we separate from Unilever, which is planned to happen before the end of 2025. We dream big but keep things simple to act fast. If you want to grow with us, make an impact, and shape the future of Ice Cream , this is the place for you! JOB PURPOSE: To minimize manual processes within current digital applications used in the Manufacturing Excellence department, streamline reporting processes (less NVAA), and strengthen the foundations of our digital transformation journey. This role is not only about reporting support; it also offers opportunities in process analysis, Local MES improvements, RCA applications, and gaining an ICMS perspective. KEY RESPONSIBILITIES: Analyze manual steps in digital reporting and MES data correction processes Support dashboarding & visualization using Power BI and MS Office Identify opportunities for automation, standardization, and NVAA reduction Contribute to RCA, Kaizen, and continuous improvement initiatives Improve MES data accuracy, data flow, and reporting structure Explore MES–Power BI integration opportunities Work closely with engineering & operations teams on digital improvements Experiences & Qualifications : WHAT YOU NEED TO SUCCEED: Graduated from or in the final year of an engineering program - Preffered Candidates from IT, Management Information Systems, Data Analytics, etc. will also be considered Intermediate knowledge of Power BI and MS Office (especially Excel) High interest in digital tools and working with data (digital awareness) Basic knowledge of Lean Manufacturing, WCM, or Six Sigma is a plus Strong analytical thinking skills Team-oriented with strong communication skills SKILLS Data analysis skills Stakeholder Management Good Communication and Presentation Cross functional understanding of business WHY JOIN US? Opportunity to learn the ICMS (Ice Cream Manufacturing System) culture and the Manufacturing Excellence approach on the shop floor Hands-on experience addressing real operational issues using RCA methodologies Contribute to enhancing the digital maturity of the Local MES system Play an active role in digital transformation projects Create real impact by optimizing reporting processes Gain experience in NVAA reduction and process streamlining Learn and apply Kaizen and continuous improvement culture Improve time management, prioritization, and planning skills Develop skills in analytical thinking, stakeholder management, and presentation A long-term and development-focused internship experience WHAT YOU CAN EXPECT: A unique mix of global scale & start-up spirit—€8.3bn powerhouse with an agile, entrepreneurial mindset. We’re building a new high growth Ice Cream company from the ground up. Career without limits—42 markets, international opportunities, and fast tracked growth. A performance-driven culture—Freedom to act, disrupt and grow – your success is measured by impact. A company that celebrates joy, innovation, and purpose—We create extraordinary careers, just like our ice cream creates extraordinary moments. title: Supply Chain Planning & Purchasing Specialist
description: Journey On! Are you ready to be part of our Travel Experience Revolution? Who we are Avolta is the world’s Leading Travel Experience Player – the product of the Dufry-Autogrill business combination. With complementary strengths in global travel retail, convenience and food & beverage, the newly combined industry titans address 2.3 billion passengers in more than 75 countries in 5,500 outlets across 1,200 airports, motorways, cruise lines, seaports, railway stations and other locations across six continents. With the traveler at our core, we are creating value for all our stakeholders including concession and brand partners, employees, communities, and finally, our shareholders. Avolta is headquartered in Basel and listed on the Swiss stock exchange, with office hubs in Milan, Madrid, London, Amsterdam, Singapore, New Jersey, Bethesda and Dubai to name a few. Want to learn more about us? Visit avoltaworld.com Supply Chain Planning & Purchasing Specialist In Türkiye, Avolta operates Duty Free and F&B stores at Istanbul Sabiha Gökçen Airport, along with Duty Free stores at Kayseri and Çukurova Airports. For the role we are recruiting for, the position will provide corporate-level support across all these operations. We are looking for an experienced candidate to join our team as a Supply Chain Planning & Purchasing Specialist , based at Istanbul Sabiha Gökçen Airport. PURPOSE OF THE ROLE To execute the weekly ordering cycle, maintain accurate replenishment parameters, analyze inventory and forecast, and support key supply chain processes to ensure the Distribution Center is fully prepared to meet operational needs. RESPONSIBILITIES Execute the daily work to ensure the correct weekly ordering cycle, Calculate replenishment based on the guidelines and logistics parameters, Analyze in transit and on hand inventory levels, Run proposals, review and implement corrections, Manage the key replenishment parameters, Analyze forecast, Follow-up purchase orders, Improve the existing tools used, Specific responsibilities as required by direct manager KEY QUALIFICATIONS • University degree in a relevant field • Excellent command of English (spoken & written) • Minimum 3 years experience in supply planning, replenishment or purchasing (preferred) • Strong SAP knowledge (essential) • Strong analytical thinking and attention to detail • Good negotiation and communication skills • Ability to multi‑task, prioritize and work accurately • Proficient in MS Office (Excel & PowerPoint) • Team‑oriented, supportive and solution‑focused Join Avolta At Avolta, our people are at the driving force behind our success. With a team of over 76,000 individuals representing more than 150 nationalities, we are a truly global company driven by passion, innovation, and excellence. Born from the combination of Dufry and Autogrill, Avolta is redefining the travel experience through the dedication and expertise of our diverse workforce. Across 73 countries and 1,000 locations, our teams bring energy, creativity, and commitment to delivering world-class travel retail and food & beverage experiences. We operate across multiple channels - including airports, motorways, cruise ships, ports, railways, and more - offering endless opportunities for collaboration and growth. Our people are empowered to make an impact, supported by a culture that values teamwork, development, and innovation. Sustainability and social responsibility are embedded in our strategy, ensuring we grow in a way that benefits both our employees and the communities we serve. Are you looking for a dynamic, international career where your contributions truly matter? Join Avolta and be part of a team that’s shaping the future of travel - together. Show more Show less

title: Supply Chain Specialist
description: Anatolia is a leading industry player in the field of ceramic, tile and natural stone products, which was founded in Canada, 1995. Anatolia is leading brand and supplier to some of the largest distributors and national DIY chains throughout the United States and Canada. Headquartered in Toronto; continues to grow globally with a corporate perspective based on passion, dedication and excellence. Anatolia won the title of "Best Supplier Partner" of 2021 in the United States and the title of "Best Managed Companies 2025 Platinum Standard" by Deloitte in Canada. Anatolia aims to break new ground in Turkey and in the world with its up-to-date technology production facility, which started production in August 2023, with a closed area of 200,000 m². Anatolia; is looking for Supply Chain Specialist teammate who can contribute to the company's values and provide quality service to our internal and external stakeholders. With this role, you will have the opportunity to be a part of our culture based on innovation, passion and excellence, where teamwork and collaboration are encouraged, talent is rewarded and diversity is respected. What you need is… Bachelor’s Degree in related field, preferably Industrial Engineering, Minimum of 3 years experience within a similar role, Experience in Supply Chain, Material planning or Production Planning, Proficient in Microsoft Office, particularly Excel, Knowledge of SAP MM required, Excellent command of English (both written and verbal), Good communication, strong planning and problem-solving skills. As a Supply Chain Specialist , you will be responsible for; Manage and monitor open purchase orders (aging, backorders etc.) and coordinate with suppliers to validate estimated time of delivery, Balance forecasts of customer demand against inventory levels, supplier deliveries, production schedules and transportation channels, Monitor inventory levels (out of stock items, urgent items, excess) and ensure timely creation of purchase orders to maintain appropriate levels of in-stock items, Review and approve suppliers shipping documents, ensuring that suppliers are adhering to Anatolia’s shipping standards such as container weight and loading instructions, and has proper shipping documents (e.g. BOL, invoices, packing list etc.), Assist in resolving delivery or documentation issues where necessary, Act as primary contact for all inquiries related to product status or issues from suppliers, customer service, management and sales, Make sure that Vendor portal is updated on time to notify our distribution Centre of product arrivals, Prepare weekly and monthly production priority lists and reports for suppliers, Confirm supplier invoices are aligned with shipment and purchase orders prior to processing, Escalate supplier issues to local representatives for further investigation, Build strong working relationships with suppliers, and train new suppliers on Anatolia’s processes, Conduct capacity analysis and provide recommendations for vendor-item combinations where necessary. Show more Show less

title: Supply Chain Specialist
description: Greif is a global leader in performance packaging located in 40 countries. The company delivers trusted, innovative, and tailored solutions that support some of the world's most in demand and fastest-growing industries. With a commitment to legendary customer service, operational excellence, and global sustainability, Greif packages life's essentials - and creates lasting value for its colleagues, customers, and other stakeholders. Learn more about the company's Customized Polymer , Sustainable Fiber , Durable Metal , and Integrated Solutions at www.greif.com and follow Greif on Instagram and LinkedIn. Our Vision Being the customer service company in the world. Our Purpose Creating packaging solutions for life’s essentials. Job Requisition #: 032640 Supply Chain Specialist (Open) Job Description Role overview A key role ensuring the flow of information and material across the network, including coordination with carriers, documentation, customs clearance, and internal stakeholders. This includes optimally planning material to support plant production following the philosophy of Demand-Driven Material Requirements Planning (MRP). Actions include supporting material/product transitions, optimizing network material inventory, coordinating with suppliers, and facilitating monthly plant-level Sales, Inventory and Operations Planning (SIOP) meetings Key Responsibilities Lead supply chain inventory processes, system settings, and achieving inventory targets for designated plants. Influence plant leadership on best practices for inventory management. Manage daily and weekly activities with suppliers and plants to optimize overall performance while providing excellent service to Greif’s customers. Analyze inventory parameters and facilitate discussions of inventory practices and opportunities for improvement. Facilitate plant Sales, Inventory, Operations and Planning meetings, including review of plant metrics (KPIs) to achieve defined targets. Monitor supplier performance and proactively escalate any concerns to the Supply Chain Planning Manager and Category Sourcing Managers. If supply shortage occurs, manage allocation of inventory across network of plants. Initiate meetings to make recommendations and evaluate options for continued supply. As Subject Matter Expert, mature the processes and technology for Demand Driven MRP. Issue Direct materials purchase orders to suppliers and manage all purchase orders lifecycle (issue, acknowledgement, open qty, backlog, rescheduling planned receipt date if needed). In times of supplier or part change, define inventory buffers and lead transition of components. Coordinate timing of incoming components, and communicates any expected shortfalls to plants for potential need for expediting. Collaborate with suppliers for projected material demand. Escalate any supply chain planning related issue for awareness and action to leadership and SIOP Partner with colleagues across site to improve inventory control and standard practices Master Data management related to the planning of materials such as supplier lead time, MinOQs, Order Increment. Review master data accuracy and maintain accordingly in the ERP system. Liaise with freight forwarders, carriers, and customs agents to ensure timely delivery. Track shipments and proactively resolve delays or discrepancies. Maintain accurate records in the ERP system. Collaborate with warehouse, production, and customer service teams to align production priorities. Ensure compliance with international and domestic shipping regulations. Requirements Bachelor’s Degree preferably in Supply Chain, Sourcing, or Operations. Minimum 5 years of experience of Supply Chain and Inventory Management experience required. Knowledge of shipping procedures, documentation, and Incoterms. Familiarity with ERP (e.g., SAP, Oracle, Infor). Excellent communication skills in English. Attention to detail and ability to work under pressure. Preferred Qualifications Experience with international shipping and customs clearance. Possesses a solid understanding of plant manufacturing operations. Experience with demand-driven planning. Affinity with large data sets and Microsoft PowerBI. Strong understanding of supply chain and inventory management concepts., and ability to apply into practice. Solid systems background and analytical skills. Demonstrates ability to work collaboratively with others as part of a team and to work effectively independently. Possesses strong attention to detail, analytical skills, and problem solving skills. Demonstrates excellent interpersonal skills and strong negotiation skills. Possesses excellent time management, planning, and prioritization skills. Cross-cultural experience a plus. At Greif , we believe that our colleagues are the center of our success. Our Total Rewards have a comprehensive focus on well-being and offer a competitive package that enables you to thrive, be engaged, and reach your full potential. Protect Yourself From Scams: We value the integrity of our recruitment process and prioritize the well-being of our candidates. While you may find Greif job postings on various platforms, all legitimate opportunities can be verified on our official Careers page at www.greif.com . All communication from Greif regarding job opportunities will also come from an @greif.com email address. If you have concerns about the legitimacy of a job posting, receive an unsolicited job offer or suspect fraudulent activity, please contact us for verification via this link Contact Us - Greif . EEO Statement https://www.greif.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/HR-101-Equal-Employment-Opportunity-Policy-English.pdf We offer a competitive salary, excellent benefits and opportunity for growth. Greif is an equal opportunity employer. We will not discriminate against any applicant or employee on the basis of sex, race, religion, age, national origin, color, disability, veteran status or any other any other legally protected characteristic. For more information read Greif’s Equal Opportunity Policy. Show more Show less

title: Supply Chain Planning Specialist
description: Who We Are? As one of the leading companies in the Food & Beverage Services field, we are looking for enthusiastic, dynamic and quality-oriented colleagues to join our innovative, dynamic team for the position of “Supply Chain Planning Specialist” located in our Head Office. General Qualifications: Graduated from relevant university departments (Engineering, Economics and Administrative Sciences, Logistics, Supply Chain, etc.), preferably with a master’s degree Minimum 3 years of experience in one of the following sectors: retail, food & beverage, hospitality, services, logistics Knowledgeable in areas such as planning, demand forecasting, production planning, warehouse management, goods receipt, inventory counting, shipment, return processes, efficiency project management, process management, and process/procedure development Advanced proficiency in written and spoken English Proficient in MS Office and MS Project programs Experienced in ERP systems Job Description: Ensuring the uninterrupted and efficient execution of the company’s production and logistics processes. Ensuring production and inventory planning in line with demand forecasts and sales plans. Coordinating demand forecasts and order management. Ensuring coordination between warehouse, production, and logistics teams. Monitoring and reporting warehouse operations (goods receipt, shelving, picking, shipment, returns); identifying improvement needs, creating action proposals, and ensuring implementation of agreed actions. Managing and reporting processes through ERP and planning/warehouse management systems. Conducting logistics/planning cost analyses and developing optimization and efficiency recommendations. Preparing necessary documents for internal and external audits and supporting related processes. Executing warehouse and logistics operations in compliance with occupational safety and quality standards. Ensuring efficient use of resources and planning and implementing operations to be timely, efficient, and cost-effective. Performing inventory and production planning based on sales forecasts and monitoring implementation in branches. Achieving time, cost, and quality optimization in operational processes. Ensuring coordination between relevant departments to support smooth process flow. Analyzing issues arising in planning processes and developing solutions. Supporting process and system improvement initiatives in areas under the responsibility of the reporting manager and the Supply Chain department. Ensuring tracking of recipe adjustments by branch planning officers and reporting monthly. Executing verbal and written requests and instructions from the reporting manager. Reviewing and reporting monthly market lists prepared by branches and headquarters; participating in branch-specific planning when necessary. Consolidating and reporting branch par-stock studies. Identifying system equivalents of products in operations such as events and banquets, defining them in request screens, determining estimated quantities, and reviewing cost studies by branch planning officers. Analyzing and reporting root causes of discrepancies between recorded and physical stock after branch warehouse counts. Ensuring accurate and timely invoice entries in branches and headquarters. Reporting monthly analyses of returns and waste in branch warehouses. Being responsible for master data management for domestic and international branches. Being responsible for system entries and removals of new and delisted products. Show more Show less

title: Management Trainee (Logistics)
description: Founded in 1987, Hayat operates in the fast-moving consumer goods (FMCG) sector, serving millions of consumers globally with 16 powerful brands. Hayat’s portfolio includes Molfix and Bebem Natural in baby care; Molped in feminine care; Joly , Evony , and Goodcare in personal healthcare; Bingo , Gleen , Test , and Has in home care; Papia , Familia , Teno , and Focus in tissue paper; and Sholk in pet care. As the 4th largest branded diaper manufacturer in the world and the leading tissue producer in the Middle East, Eastern Europe, and Africa, Hayat employs over 10.000 people across its operations. Hayat operates 21 production facilities in 8 countries , including Turkey, Egypt, Iran, Algeria, Russia, Nigeria, Pakistan, and Vietnam, and manages sales and distribution companies in Morocco, Bulgaria, Kenya, Thailand, and Malaysia. With its global operations structured under three main regions Eurasia & Americas, Middle East & Africa, and Asia Pacific Hayat reaches over 100 countries across 5 continents, bringing its brands into millions of homes worldwide. We are currently seeking a talented “Management Trainee” to join our dynamic “Logistics” team based in “ Istanbul ”. If you want to be part of a diverse and vibrant community where your ideas can shape the future of the FMCG industry and your contributions can create a lasting global impact, then Hayat is waiting for you! Why should you apply for H Generation Management Trainee Program? With our H Generation Management Trainee Program, we target to help the selected individuals enrich their talent by offering well-designed training plans, mentorship and rotation programs across departments. These programs are designed to be supported with regular feedback sessions. You can apply for H Generation MT Program, if you meet requirements below: • Fresh graduate or master’s student • Have excellent verbal and written communication skills • Fluent in English • Eager to learn in a global environment • Interested in FMCG field and Logistics function You can see our next process steps below: Application / Online Assessment Process / Interview / Job Offer As Hayat, we know that success will come as we take action in our journey that starts anew every day. That's why we don't stop, we don't wait, we Make Our Move. Make Your Move today, apply for this opportunity and join us. Looking forward to meeting you! What We Offer You Private Health Insurance Employee Shuttle Service Meal Voucher / Canteen Monthly Employee Support Package (Assortment of Hayat Products or Food Package) Monthly Internet Allowence Baby Diaper Support (For Children Up to 4 Years Old) and Diaper Support for 1st Degree Relatives of Employees) 3 Days of Administrative Paid Leave Per Year Heating and Eid Allowance Once a Year Award & Recognition Programs FLEX: Flexible Benefits Program Wezone: Rewards and Recognition Program Seniority Award Support Heltia: Employee Assistance Program At Hayat, we conduct fair and inclusive hiring processes. We do not tolerate prejudice or discrimination based on language, religion, ethnicity, race, age or gender. Our recruitment process is solely based on the alignment with the job description, measurable and objective assessments, and competency-based interviews. Get to know us Please visit us at the following addresses for any information you need: https://www.hayat.com/en-tr/ https://www.instagram.com/hayatkimya/ Clarification Text for Employee Candidate : https://www.hayat.com/aydinlatma-metni/aydinlatma-metni.htm Show more Show less

title: Supply Chain Long Term Intern
description: About Goodyear We’re dedicated to producing, innovating, and servicing the best tires in the world. For over 125 years, Goodyear has led the way in developing smart solutions that shape the future of mobility. Today, we’re one global team united by bold thinking, relentless drive, and a passion to exceed expectations. If you’re ready to embrace change and make an impact in your career, let’s go. Why This Role Matters As a Supply Chain Intern, you'll play a key role in our Supply Chain Team, supporting initiatives that help us deliver excellent service and strengthen customer relationships. title: Production Planning Specialist
description: YANMAR is a globally recognized brand, leading the way in engines, energy systems, agriculture, construction machinery, and maritime sectors. Our company, which has demonstrated strong growth momentum in Turkey, stands out in the industry with innovative solutions and a solid vision. As an organization that values teamwork and places great importance on employee satisfaction, we are seeking a new team member for the position of Production Planning Specialist . If you would like to contribute to our success story by joining a dynamic work environment where you can develop your leadership skills, we look forward to receiving your application. Qualifications: Bachelor’s Degree, especially in Engineering (Industrial, Mechanical, etc.), Excellent command of written and spoken English (mandatory), Min. 3 years of experience in production planning, warehouse operations, inventory control, and ERP systems; automotive sector experience preferred, Knowledge of ISO 9001 and/or IATF 16949 quality management systems, Proficiency in ERP systems (preferably Canias) and ability to support related processes, Strong understanding of inventory tracking, stock optimization, and cost‑efficient material usage, Ability to prepare and execute production plans based on sales forecasts and capacity data, Experience in material requirements planning (MRP) and coordination with procurement teams, Strong analytical and reporting skills with a focus on efficiency improvement, Good command of MS Office applications, especially Excel, Strong organizational, planning, and time‑management abilities, Ability to work in Torbalı. Job Description: Prepare and update production plans in line with monthly and annual sales forecasts. Create and communicate material requirement plans to the Purchasing Department based on approved production schedules. Support the planning and timely procurement of domestically and internationally sourced raw materials. Issue and track production-related work orders in the ERP system and monitor material flow between the warehouse and production. Assist in shipment planning to ensure accurate and timely delivery of finished goods. Monitor inventory levels, support stock optimization efforts, and contribute to cost‑control activities. Perform data entry and generate operational reports within the Canias ERP system. Track production plan adherence, identify deviations, and support corrective actions. Contribute to the efficient use of production resources such as labor, equipment, and capacity. Support ISO‑aligned quality management processes and participate in internal and external audits when required. title: Global Category Supply Planning Executive
description: Founded in 1987, Hayat operates in the fast-moving consumer goods (FMCG) sector, serving millions of consumers globally with 16 powerful brands. Hayat’s portfolio includes Molfix and Bebem Natural in baby care; Molped in feminine care; Joly , Evony , and Goodcare in personal healthcare; Bingo , Gleen , Test , and Has in home care; Papia , Familia , Teno , and Focus in tissue paper; and Sholk in pet care. As the 4th largest branded diaper manufacturer in the world and the leading tissue producer in the Middle East, Eastern Europe, and Africa, Hayat employs over 10.000 people across its operations. Hayat operates 21 production facilities in 8 countries , including Turkey, Egypt, Iran, Algeria, Russia, Nigeria, Pakistan, and Vietnam, and manages sales and distribution companies in Morocco, Bulgaria, Kenya, Thailand, and Malaysia. With its global operations structured under three main regions Eurasia & Americas, Middle East & Africa, and Asia Pacific Hayat reaches over 100 countries across 5 continents, bringing its brands into millions of homes worldwide. This role is pivotal in managing Hayat's global supply chain planning. The ideal candidate will possess a blend of analytical and communication skills and the ability to collaborate effectively with various functions at all levels. Success in this role will depend on strategic thinking, attention to detail, and proactive management of supply chain dynamics. This role will be part of the global supply chain organization and report to the global category supply planning group manager. Responsibilities Coordinate Planning and Analysis : Oversee planning efforts and analyze existing materials, finished goods and new product launches across our global manufacturing network. Collaboration and Capacity Enhancement : Establish and nurture strong relationships with global procurement, manufacturing, other global functions and local supply chain organizations. Supply Chain Strategy Development : Analyze supply chain constraints and assist in formulating strategies to improve operational capacity. Product Launch Coordination : Coordinate the timing of product launches and inventory ramp-up plans with launch planning teams. Customer Service Excellence : Maintain high service levels for customers, ensuring minimal to no stockouts. Inventory optimization: Optimize inventory levels for the assigned category and ensure inventory numbers meet the target inventory levels. Minimize slow moving inventory and obsolete stocks. Collaboration with local planners : Work closely with local production planners to ensure a consistent supply of finished goods and raw materials. Qualifications Minimum 7 years of “supply chain planning” experience Experience in FMCG or a similar industry, experience in hygiene industry is preferred. University degree in engineering Understanding of sales and operations planning process and experience in managing supply reviews as part of the S&OP cycle. Exceptional interpersonal, verbal, and written communication skills, with the ability to engage with all organizational levels. Focus on the quality of work and continuous process improvement. Proficiency in Microsoft Office applications, particularly Excel and PowerPoint. Prior experience with SAP MM , MRP , PP/DS and SAP IBP (preferred). Fluency in English is required. What We Offer You Private Health Insurance Employee Shuttle Service Meal Voucher / Canteen Monthly Employee Support Package (Assortment of Hayat Products or Food Package) Monthly Internet Allowence Baby Diaper Support (For Children Up to 4 Years Old) and Diaper Support (for 1st Degree Relatives of Employees) 3 Days of Administrative Paid Leave Per Year Heating and Eid Allowance Once a Year Award & Recognition Programs FLEX: Flexible Benefits Program Wezone: Rewards and Recognition Program Seniority Award Support Heltia: Employee Assistance Program At Hayat, we conduct fair and inclusive hiring processes. We do not tolerate prejudice or discrimination based on language, religion, ethnicity, race, age or gender. title: Material & Production Planning Specialist
description: We are looking for a highly motivated Material & Production Planning Specialist with a minimum of 2 years of experience. The Material & Production Planning Specialist is responsible for planning and coordinating material availability and production activities to ensure smooth and uninterrupted manufacturing operations. This role focuses on material planning, production scheduling, ERP-based planning processes, and coordination between purchasing, production, and logistics functions. The position ensures that all materials and production resources are aligned with project timelines, delivery targets, and inventory optimization goals while supporting continuous improvement across planning processes. Responsibilities 1. Material Planning & ERP Operations • Analyze project BOMs and create material requirements through the ERP system. • Plan material requirements in line with production schedules and project timelines. • Execute, review, and optimize MRP (Material Requirements Planning) results to ensure accurate forecasting and timely replenishment. • Maintain and update planning parameters including lead times, safety stock levels, minimum order quantities, reorder points, and lot-sizing rules. • Identify and resolve MRP exceptions such as shortages, delays, rescheduling needs, and excess inventory. • Ensure accuracy of item master data and BOM structures for reliable planning outputs. • Monitor incoming materials and proactively manage risks impacting production plans. • Ensure accurate and timely ERP transactions related to material movements and planning activities. 2. Production Planning & Coordination • Prepare and maintain production plans based on project priorities, capacity availability, and material readiness. • Coordinate closely with production teams to ensure achievable and efficient production schedules. • Monitor production progress and update plans according to changing priorities or constraints. • Support workload balancing and production sequencing to improve operational efficiency. • Identify bottlenecks and propose planning improvements to increase production performance. 3. Supplier Coordination & Material Follow-up • Coordinate with purchasing and suppliers to ensure on-time material delivery aligned with production plans. • Track critical materials and expedite deliveries when necessary. • Support supplier communication regarding delivery schedules and planning changes. 4. Cross-Functional Collaboration • Act as a key interface between purchasing, production, warehouse, logistics, and project management teams. • Ensure clear and timely communication regarding material availability and production risks. • Support continuous improvement initiatives in planning and material flow processes. 5. Reporting & Documentation • Prepare regular reports on production plan status, material availability, shortages, and planning KPIs. • Maintain planning-related documentation and data accuracy. • Support internal audits with accurate planning and material records. Experience • Minimum 2–3 years of experience in material planning, production planning, or supply chain operations. • Experience in project-based manufacturing, preferably automation, machinery, or robotics industries. • Hands-on experience with ERP systems (Canias ,SAP or equivalent). • Experience in MRP-based planning environments preferred. Education • A degree in Engineering (Industrial, Mechatronics, Electrical-Electronics, or related fields). Skills & Competencies • Strong analytical and planning skills. • Strong coordination and communication abilities. • Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously. • Good understanding of production workflows, inventory dynamics, and material flow. • Problem-solving mindset with a proactive approach. • High attention to detail and strong organizational skills. • Proficiency in ERP systems. • Professional English communication skills (written and spoken). Need to Relocate or Mobility The role may require occasional domestic travel for supplier visits, production coordination, and operational activities. Show more Show less
