title: Intern
description: This job is with EBRD, an inclusive employer and a member of myGwork – the largest global platform for the LGBTQ+ business community. Please do not contact the recruiter directly. Requisition ID 36595 Office Country Türkiye Office City Istanbul Division Banking Countries of Operations Contract Type Intern Contract Length 06 months Posting End Date 16/04/2026 Purpose of Job The Intern will support the COP31 coordination team in the preparation and delivery of activities related to the COP31 event to be held in Antalya, Türkiye, in November 2026. The intern will contribute to a range of logistical, operational, and technical tasks required before and during the event, helping ensure the smooth functioning of on-the-ground activities and coordination among stakeholders. The Intern will assist in organising event logistics, coordinating with internal teams and external partners, and providing day-to-day operational support during the preparation phase as well as throughout the conference period. While supporting multiple workstreams across the team’s responsibilities, the intern will also contribute to background research, information management, and technical assistance related to event delivery. The Local Administration Team is responsible for providing operational, logistical, and administrative support for the organisation and delivery of the COP31 conference to be held in Antalya, Türkiye, in November 2026. The team plays a central role in ensuring that the day-to-day administrative functions and on-the-ground coordination required for a large-scale international conference are carried out efficiently and in close collaboration with relevant national authorities, international partners, and conference stakeholders. Under the leadership of the Principal Administration Manager, the team manages a broad range of operational activities that support the planning, preparation, and implementation of COP31. These include coordinating local logistics, managing administrative processes, supporting procurement and vendor coordination, and facilitating communication and coordination between the conference secretariat, government counterparts, service providers, and other participating organisations. The team is also responsible for overseeing routine administrative operations related to the conference preparation and delivery, including documentation management, scheduling and coordination of meetings, logistical arrangements for delegations and events, and providing practical support during the conference period to ensure smooth operations. Working in a fast-paced and dynamic environment, the Local Administration Team supports both planned activities and ad hoc operational needs that arise in the lead-up to and during the conference. The intern will work under the supervision of the Principal Administration Manager and support the team across a variety of daily and ad hoc tasks, contributing to the effective coordination and delivery of COP31-related administrative and logistical activities. Accountabilities & Responsibilities Provide comprehensive administrative and operational support to the team on the ground and to relevant HQ functions to contribute to the smooth planning and delivery of the COP31 event in Antalya, Türkiye. Work closely with both internal colleagues and external stakeholders, including service providers, partner institutions, and conference counterparts, to support coordination and information flow. Assist the team with logistical coordination and day-to-day administrative tasks related to COP31 preparation and implementation, including documentation, scheduling, and meeting coordination. Provide occasional administrative and coordination support to other related project activities and workstreams as required. Support the team with ad hoc tasks and special assignments that arise in the context of conference planning and operations. Assist in monitoring relevant developments, operational updates, and information related to COP31 planning and implementation. Attend internal and external meetings or events when appropriate and provide brief summaries or notes to support team coordination. Contribute to effective communication and coordination across teams by helping track actions, maintain documentation, and support information management processes. Knowledge, Skills, Experience & Qualifications Fluency in English; Excellent writing skills in English and an eye for quality and detail Communication skills – Ability to communicate appropriate, concise and accurate information in verbal and written formats, appropriate to the audience at the time Strong research skills – Ability to research and distill information with speed and efficiency Computer literacy, conversant with Microsoft Office and spread sheet packages. Ability to work independently while also knowing when to seek advice; Ability to operate in a multi-cultural environment with changing priorities. Strong Team player University student or graduates within the last 3 years are suitable. You will be part of a pioneering and diverse international organisation, and use your talents to make a real difference to people's lives and help shape the future of the regions we invest in. At EBRD, our Values – Inclusiveness, Innovation, Trust, and Responsibility – are at the heart of how we work. We bring these to life through our Workplace Behaviours: listening well and speaking up, collaborating smartly, acting decisively with full commitment, and simplifying to amplify our impact. These principles shape our culture and define our success. We seek individuals who not only share these values but are also committed to embedding them in their daily work, fostering a positive and high-performing environment. A working culture that embraces inclusion and celebrates diversity. Our workforce reflects a broad range of backgrounds, perspectives, and experiences, bringing fresh ideas, energy, and innovation and enhancing our ability to serve our clients, shareholders, and counterparties effectively. A hybrid workplace that offers flexibility to teams and individuals; that is based on trust, flexibility and connectedness. title: Human Resources Intern
description: Are you eager to build a career in Human Resources and ready to apply your theoretical knowledge in a real business environment? Join our HR team! The CMA CGM Group , a global leader in shipping and logistics, serves more than 420 ports around the world on five continents. Present in 160 countries through its network of more than 400 offices and 750 warehouses, the Group employs more than 155,000 people worldwide, including 4,000 in Marseilles where its head office is located. With its subsidiary CEVA Logistics, a world leader in logistics, and its air freight division CMA CGM AIR CARGO, the CMA CGM Group is continually innovating to offer its customers a complete and increasingly efficient range of new shipping, land, air, and logistics solutions. As a result of expanding our organization, we are looking for a Human Resources Intern to join our fast-growing and challenging organization. Key Responsibilities: Support recruitment and onboarding processes, Assist with CV screening and interview scheduling, Take part in ongoing HR projects, Support internal communication and documentation tasks within the department, Assist with departmental purchases and invoice processing. What We’re Looking For: 3rd or 4th-year university students from relevant departments (Psychology, Business Administration, HR Management, etc.), Good command of English, both verbal and written, Available to work full-time in the summer period at the office in Istanbul, Strong communication skills, Problem-solving and adaptability in a dynamic work environment, Eager to learn. What We Offer: Real hands-on experience in a corporate environment A dynamic and supportive team Breakfast: every Monday morning Transportation (Shuttle) Meal allowance Happy hours Valuable learning and networking opportunities for your future career During the recruitment process, the personal data you provide in your CV is processed for purposes including contacting you, implementing human resources policies and procedures, managing candidate selection and placement processes, conducting reference checks, and ensuring security. For more detailed information about how your data is processed, please refer to our Employee Candidate Privacy Notice. We have zero tolerance for inequality and are deeply committed to fostering Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion (DE&I) at every level of our organization. As HR and business partners, we actively drive and support initiatives that build a more inclusive and equitable workplace for all. Come along on CMA CGM's adventure! Show more Show less

title: Contractor Quality Lead
description: Role Description: The Global External Quality Operations Mission is “to be a proactive partner, driving a science and risk-based compliant quality culture that is flexible, innovative, and customer oriented, maximizing the contribution of Quality Operations to Our Path Forward initiatives.” External Supply Operations Quality (ESOQ) is committed to supporting Pfizer Global Supply (PGS) as an innovative and competitive advantage for Pfizer by assuring the quality of products manufactured and packaged by other companies (Contractors) for Pfizer. ESOQ is responsible for the Quality & Regulatory management of approximately 300 contract manufacturers, packagers, and supply partners globally. As a Senior Manager, the advanced and comprehensive knowledge of the principles and concepts of GMP and of other disciplines will enable the function to lead complex projects across the division and support /back up the ESOQ Quality Operations Team Lead as needed. Some regional specific roles may have region specific responsibilities. Accountabilities Actively contributes as part of the ESOQ Tier 2 structure to ensure that Pfizer network of External suppliers / CMO’s / partners are supported to deliver high quality products, on time, and in compliance with all established standards and agency guidelines/ applicable GMP regulations. Responsibilities: Manage all aspects related to product quality or compliance for a complex portfolio of external contract manufacturers and suppliers that supply Product(s) globally Assess the quality of external supplier’s products, processes and related documents while ensuring the product specifications are met and quality systems are maintained. Support internal and external partners with auditing activities related to ESOQ activities, or activities at a portfolio of contractors - (RQA audits or regulatory inspections) as applicable Support internal and external partners with Compliance Assessments to ensure current GMP/GDP adherence Manage Risk at Vendors implementing Quality Improvement Plans and support Risk assessments, QRTs and QANs as necessary Support onboarding activities of new CMO’s or product launches within the portfolio as applicable. Support offboarding activities for exiting CMO’s/products/SKUs within the portfolio as applicable Make product Quality decisions leveraging advanced knowledge of Quality/Manufacturing principles, prior work experience and concepts in other technical areas while ensuring compliance to global regulatory and Pfizer requirements. Ability to lead and influence quality decision making across all levels of the organization and with our external partners. Provide Quality Leadership within the cross functional virtual site operating teams (VSOT). Partner with colleagues to develop and negotiate quality agreements. Review and approve Annual Product Review and Product Quality Review (APR/PQR) reports and relevant product stability reports. Perform batch disposition endorsement. Identify, develop and implement continuous improvement initiatives related to ESOQ processes to ensure compliance with the latest internal and external standards. Ensure the adequate tracking and documentation of all required quality related actions in the relevant system(s) and that all required escalation processes are followed. Lead and support complex investigations, market complaints, risk assessments and others in support of products within your portfolio. Raise NTMs and connect with SMEs where needed. Provide Performance Metrics for key performance indicators. Work independently and operate with minimal supervision, interact with high levels of management both at contract manufacturers and within Pfizer. Build, maintain and develop relationships with key stakeholders, both internal and external to Pfizer. Support the development, implementation and continuous improvement of innovative Quality Systems. Be a resource for manager level colleagues on the team and peers in External Supply Quality and be able to provide directions to peers including risk-based decision making and innovative solutions to ambiguous problems. Develop ideas and lead complex crossfunctional project teams including internal business and manufacturing organizations (e.g. External Supply, Regulatory, Technical Support, Quality, PGS sites and R&D), anticipate potential challenges the team may encounter, and be responsible for the team’s deliverables and milestones. Show interest in Innovation and innovative approaches. Support ESOQ Leadership In Other Tasks As Required. Support and act as back up of the team Site Quality Operations Lead as required. If applicable: Managing all aspects related to product quality or compliance for a portfolio of external contract manufacturers (CMO), contract testing organizations (CTO) and suppliers that supply materials/product(s) to Pfizer according to established procedures. Creation of Process Orders (POs) and support to define provisions within the SOW/MSA for QC testing execution at the CTO. Ensure stability studies at CMO/CTO sites are conducted according to approved protocols and ICH guidance. Qualifications: Minimally Bachelor of Science Degree, Pharmacy, Engineering, or related technical discipline Minimally 10 years’ experience in Pharmaceutical or Medical Device Quality Assurance roles with direct responsibility for product quality decisions and /or 15 years’ experience in the pharmaceutical or medical device industry. Experience with external suppliers/contractors. Advanced computer skills for MSOffice and enterprise systems such SAP, QTS, Vault, Documentum platforms, Minitab Proficient in English and technical writing Strong verbal, written communication, and presentation skills Demonstrated personal leadership to lead virtual teams and cross functional projects/initiatives Is diplomatic, clear & succinct in communication with internal and external stakeholders Demonstrated experience managing complex quality and compliance activities Demonstrated ability to resolve conflicts Demonstrated managerial/organizational skills Self-motivator & proven ability to lead independently Strong organizing and planning skills and a high sense of urgency Demonstrated knowledge of US, European and global cGMPs, compliance issues, inspectional trends, industry quality assurance practices Proven leadership/facilitation skills and being able to involve several levels of an organization to successfully meet the objectives Work Location Assignment: Hybrid GJL: J090 Worker Type: Regular Pfizer is an equal opportunity employer and complies with all applicable equal employment opportunity legislation in each jurisdiction in which it operates. Quality Assurance and Control Show more Show less

title: Supplier Quality Manager (Site)
description: Fantastic challenges. Amazing opportunities. GKN Aerospace is reimagining air travel: going further, faster and greener! Fuelled by great people whose expertise and creativity sets the standards in our industry, we’re inspired by the opportunities to innovate and break boundaries. We’re proud to play a part in protecting the world’s democracies. And we’re committed to putting sustainability at the centre of everything we do, opening up and protecting our planet. With over 16,000 employees across 33 manufacturing sites in 12 countries we serve over 90% of the world’s aircraft and engine manufacturers and achieved sales of £3.35 bn.in 2023. There are no limits to where you can take your career. Job Summary To be functionally responsible for all Supplier quality activities, within the Site Procurement organisation. This role requires strong people leadership and resource management skills to deliver against performance objectives focused on continuous improvement, people development and supplier quality performance. Job Responsibilities All Quality Assurance activities within the Procurement Business Assures that the Quality system is adequate and is being applied and adhered to within the business, through the provision of independently gathered evidence by the business. Assures that the certification processes within the business is adequately defined, accurate, credible, robust and consistently applied. Driving Supplier Quality Improvement Plans within the Function to achieve Global Procurement and department targets (i.e. escapes reduction plans and concession (tags) reduction plans) Contact point for partners / internal customer representatives, facilitating / managing customer inspection. Ensuring that competent Manufacturing Engineers accurately convert the customer requirements in to clear supplier instructions. Accuracy of the Quality data set. Acting as a focal point for Quality issues relating to the supply of product. Driving supplier process improvements Developing and deploying performance and process metrics that are consistent across the Global Procurement organisation. Ensure the Health and Safety policies and procedure are adhered to by the Procurement Quality team; Accountable for the management of the people within the Procurement Quality team ensuring that PDP, development plans and succession planning is completed; Ensuring that the people within the Procurement Quality team have the adequate skills to carry out their roles, where skill gaps are identified, putting training and development plans in place to address them. Ensuring adherence to all applicable regulatory, legal, and quality requirements. Job Qualifications We’ll offer you fantastic challenges and amazing opportunities. This is your chance to be part of an organisation that has proven itself to be at the cutting edge of our industry; and is committed to pushing the boundaries even further. And with some of the best training on offer in the industry, who knows how far you can go? A Great Place to work needs a Great Way of Working Everyone is welcome to apply to GKN. We believe that we can only achieve our ambitions through a coming together of diverse minds who enjoy collaborating in an inspirational environment. Through our commitment to diversity, inclusion and belonging and by living our five powerful principles we’ve created a culture where everyone feels welcome to contribute. It’s a culture that won us ‘The Best Workplace Culture Award’. By embracing and celebrating what makes us unique we encourage everyone to bring their full self to work. We’re also committed to providing an accessible recruitment process, so if you require reasonable adjustments at any stage during our recruitment process please get in touch and let us know. We are the place where human dreams, plus human endeavour, shape the future of aerospace innovation and technology. Show more Show less

title: Air Operation Team Leader
description: Before you apply to a job, select your language preference from the options available at the top right of this page. Explore your next opportunity at a Fortune Global 500 organization. Envision innovative possibilities, experience our rewarding culture, and work with talented teams that help you become better every day. We know what it takes to lead UPS into tomorrow—people with a unique combination of skill + passion. If you have the qualities and drive to lead yourself or teams, there are roles ready to cultivate your skills and take you to the next level. Qualifications Job Description: Bachelor degree preferably in Business Administration, Economics, Foreign Trade or Logistics, Excellent command of English, spoken and written At least 3 years experience in Air Freight Operations Advanced knowledge of MS Office tools, Ability to manage multiple tasks, meet deadlines, and work in a fast-paced and international environment Job Description We are looking for an Air Operation Team leader to work at UPS- SCS. Assign tasks to team members based on workload and priorities. Understand company goals and set clear team goals accordingly. Track and monitor day-to-day operations Monitor team performance and report on metrics Support team members in case of problems and escalate issues to management in case impacting service Motivate team members and give proper feedback to improve performance Monitor and report KPI performance (OTIF, pick accuracy, productivity). Support implementation of new tools, systems and implementations Daily communication with international partners about logistics solutions. İş Tanımı ve Genel Nitelikler /Job Description and General Qualifications Senior Mobile Engineer İşler Teknoloji · Istanbul/Ankara · Full-time We’re looking for a Senior Mobile Engineer who doesn’t just ship features, but understands how mobile systems actually work under the hood. You’ll work on high-scale mobile applications where JS, UI, and native layers intersect, and take ownership from first brainstorming session to production releases. What You’ll Do Own new and existing mobile projects from idea to App Store / Play Store release Architect and build scalable features using React Native (New Architecture) Write and maintain native modules (Swift / Kotlin) when needed Optimize performance across JS thread, UI thread, and native layers Identify and fix bottlenecks in rendering, memory, and startup time Own CI/CD pipelines and App Store / Play Store release processes end-to-end Collaborate with backend, design, and product in a fast-paced environment Mentor mid-level engineers and contribute to technical decisions What We’re Looking For 4+ years of mobile development experience Deep understanding of React Native internals (bridge, threads, rendering) Solid fundamentals in concurrency, parallelism, and threading Experience writing native modules and platform-specific integrations Proven ownership of CI/CD pipelines (Fastlane, GitHub Actions, Bitrise, etc.) Experience profiling and optimizing render performance, memory, and startup time Ability to explain trade-offs and make pragmatic engineering decisions Tech Stack React Native · JSI / Fabric · Swift · Kotlin · TypeScript · Fastlane · GitHub Actions · Firebase · Expo / EAS Nice to Have Flutter experience in production App security & obfuscation What We Offer Real ownership — from architecture to production Hybrid work setup in Istanbul A strong team that pushes each other Clear growth path toward tech lead or architect roles Başvuru: https://www.islerteknoloji.com/kariyer/senior-mobile-engineer İletişim Boğaziçi Üniversitesi Kariyer Merkezi Güney Kampüs 34342 Bebek-İstanbul Tel. title: Production Planning Associate
description: At JTI we celebrate differences, and everyone truly belongs. 46,000 people from all over the world are continuously building their unique success story with us. 83% of employees feel happy working at JTI. To make a difference with us, all you need to do is bring your human best. What will your story be? Apply now! Learn more jti.com | JTI Turkiye | JTI Turkiye Young Talent Programs Please, apply till 17th April Production Planning Associate (Temporary for 2 years) The Production Planning Associate plays a key role in turning demand forecasts into clear and executable production plans. This role ensures that production in Make & Pack, Filter, and Tobacco Processing runs smoothly by balancing customer demand, inventory targets, and operational constraints. The position will be based in Izmir and will report to Production Planning Manager. Position As a Production Planning Associate, you will Prepare and manage short-term, mid-term, and long‑term production plans for finished goods, filters, and tobacco processing. Translate sales forecasts and orders into realistic production schedules. Monitor inventory levels of finished and semi‑finished goods and take proactive actions when targets are at risk. Review demand changes in planning systems and adjust production plans accordingly. Coordinate and communicate plan changes with production teams and relevant stakeholders. Maintain production planning master data (e.g. routings, production versions, resources). Support capacity planning, workload balancing, and reporting activities. Requirements University degree (Industrial Engineering preferred). Minimum 2 years of experience in a similar role. Experience with SAP is preferred, strong MS Office skills, especially Excel and PowerPoint. Very good command of English and Turkish. Strong analytical and planning skills with a detail oriented and solution focused mindset. Ability to work proactively with multiple stakeholders in a fast-paced manufacturing environment. What To Expect At JTI, we believe great talent deserves great rewards. Here’s what you can look forward to when you join our team Competitive Rewards & Profit-Sharing Enjoy a rewarding compensation package with an attractive incentive plan tied to company performance. Work Your Way Enjoy 50% hybrid working options and a work-from-home allowance (available for eligible roles). Your Benefits, Your Way Based On Your Preferences Flexible benefits tailored to your lifestyle and priorities such as health insurance with family coverage, contributory pension plan, shared purchase, wellbeing support. Family Comes First Enjoy 20 weeks of fully paid family leave—including extended paid paternity leave and full maternity pay—with our JTI Family Leave Benefit. Grow with Us Explore exciting career development and personal growth opportunities in a truly international environment. Unlock ongoing learning with global training programs, expert-led webinars, e-learning platforms, and sponsored professional certifications. 6698 sayılı Kişisel Verilerin Korunması Kanunu ve ilgili mevzuat kapsamında kişisel verilerinizin korunması için tedbir almaktayız. KVKK ve ilgili mevzuat çerçevesinde kişisel verilerinizin işlenmesi hakkındaki aydınlatma metni ve daha detayı bilgiye https //kurumsalpano.com/JTI_CAKVAM.pdf linkten ulaşabilirsiniz. We take measures to protect your personal data in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act No. 6698 and related legislation. For the privacy notice regarding the processing of your personal data under the PDPA and related regulations, and for more detailed information, please visit https //kurumsalpano.com/JTI_CAKVAM.pdf Are you ready to join us? Build your success story at JTI. Apply now! Next Steps After applying, if selected, please anticipate the following within 1-3 weeks of the job posting closure Phone screening with Talent Advisor > Assessment tests > Interviews > Offer. Each step is eliminatory and may vary by role type. At JTI, we strive to create a diverse and inclusive work environment. As an equal-opportunity employer, we welcome applicants from all backgrounds. If you need any specific support, alternative formats, or have other access requirements, please let us know. Show more Show less

title: Production Quality Intern, Forward Program
description: Autoliv, a global leader in automotive safety systems, is seeking a motivated Production Quality Intern to join our team at the Gebze plant. We manufacture and market airbags, seatbelts and steering wheels. This internship provides hands‑on experience in production quality activities, data analysis and continuous improvement within a manufacturing environment. Key Responsibilities Collect, validate and analyse production and quality data; prepare clear status reports for management and team leads. Support day‑to‑day quality checks on the shop floor, including first article inspections, in‑process audits and final inspections. Assist in documenting and updating work instructions, standard operating procedures and quality records. Participate in root cause analysis (8D), corrective actions and continuous improvement activities. Skills & Knowledge Strong written and verbal communication skills in English Proficient in MS Office applications (Word, Excel, Outlook) Ability to handle confidential information with discretion and professionalism Comfortable working both independently and as part of a team A motivated, solution-oriented mindset with a strong willingness to learn Who Are We Looking For? 3rd year bachelor’s degree students Available to work a minimum of 3–4 days per week Previous administrative or internship experience is desirable but not essential Experience in a manufacturing or industrial environment is considered a plus 🌍 Equal Opportunities Autoliv is an inclusive employer and welcomes applications from candidates of all backgrounds. All qualified applicants are considered without regard to gender, identity, ethnicity, or ability. Role Location Kocaeli-Gebze Show more Show less

title: Lighting Design (knowledge of AutoCAD) Long-Term Intern
description: About Signify Through bold discovery and cutting-edge innovation, we lead an industry that is vital for the future of our planet: lighting. Through our leadership in connected lighting and the Internet of Things, we're breaking new ground in data analytics, AI, and smart solutions for homes, offices, cities, and beyond. At Signify, you can shape tomorrow by building on our incredible 125+ year legacy while working toward even bolder sustainability goals. Our culture of continuous learning, creativity, and commitment to diversity and inclusion empowers you to grow your skills and career. Join us, and together, we’ll transform our industry, making a lasting difference for brighter lives and a better world. More About The Role We are Signify, the new company name of Philips Lighting. We’re the world leader in lighting for professionals, consumers and for the Internet of Things. Our passion for sustainability makes us one of the top 10 greenest companies in the world. See #SignifyLife through the eyes of our employees! Working as a Lighting Design Long-Term Intern at Signify is dynamic. We’re greater together through peer learning in our globally diverse team, with different backgrounds and nationalities. We’re looking for a Lighting Design Long-Term Intern who’ll be responsible for providing lighting design outcomes and support. You’ll be part of the Signify Turkey Lighting Design Center. What you’ll do Support to develop lighting concepts Prepare of lighting calculations Prepare of technical documentation Prepare visualizations and presentations of proposed lighting solutions to customers and end users What you’ll need Final year students in bachelor or master programs Study preference in the area of electrical/electronics engneering, architecture, interior architecture, landscape architecture, industrial design or equivalents Fluent English and Turkish (both written and spoken) is obligatory Active Autocad software usage is obligatory Knowledge of Dialux, Dialux Evo, Relux, Photoshop, 3D studio, Revit, Lumiom will be an added value Willingness to grow in transforming lighting industry Creativity; excellent communication as well as interpersonal skills Ability to interact with others in a professional, courteous and ethical manner Flexible team player and self-motivated What we promise We’re committed to the continuous development of our employees, using our learning to shape the future of light and create a sustainable future. Join the undisputed leader in the lighting industry and be part of our diverse global team. #WeAreSignify #SignifyLife Everything we’ll do for you You can grow a lasting career here. We’ll encourage you, support you, and challenge you. We’ll help you learn and progress in a way that’s right for you, with coaching and mentoring along the way. We’ll listen to you too, because we see and value every one of our 27,000+ people. We believe that a diverse and inclusive workplace fosters creativity, innovation, and a full spectrum of bright ideas. With a global workforce present in 70+ countries, we are dedicated to creating an inclusive environment where every voice is heard and valued, helping us all achieve more together. Come join us, and together we can light up the future. Show more Show less

title: Sales Excellence Intern
description: Job Description About the Position We have an excellent opportunity available for a Sales Excellence Intern to make a difference at Kraft Heinz Turkey. The Sales Excellence Intern will support the Sales Excellence team in routine reporting, data cleaning, and sales & trade marketing operations. This role aims to improve data accuracy, reporting efficiency, and operational discipline across commercial processes. The position offers hands-on exposure to sales analytics, commercial performance management, and cross-functional collaboration within a fast-paced FMCG environment. Key Responsibilities Assist in the preparation of regular sales reports (sell-in, sell-out, KPI tracking, performance dashboards). Support data consolidation from multiple sources, including distributor files and internal systems Perform data cleaning, validation, and reconciliation to ensure reporting accuracy. Maintain and update recurring Excel-based reporting templates under the guidance of the Sales Analyst. Support ad-hoc analytical requests as needed. Support tracking of trade marketing and sales operations activities (allocations, basic spend tracking, customer performance). Assist in operational coordination related to trade materials, sampling, and supply requests. Maintain basic trackers for trade marketing execution. Support trade marketing field executions in Istanbul. Assist in preparing presentation materials (charts, tables, summaries) for internal meetings. Provide general administrative and analytical support to the team when required. Qualifications 4th-year undergraduate student or recent graduate in Industrial Engineering, Business Administration,Economics or related fields. Strong Excel skills (Pivot Tables, VLOOKUP/XLOOKUP, basic formulas). High attention to detail and data accuracy. Comfortable working with large datasets. Strong analytical mindset with structured thinking. High sense of ownership and responsibility for assigned tasks. Good communication skills both English and Turkish and willingness to ask clarifying questions. Ability to manage deadlines, prioritize workload, and follow up on long-term initiatives What We Offer Hands-on experience in Sales Excellence and Commercial Analytics. Exposure to real-life FMCG sales processes and distributor environments. Practical understanding of reporting governance, data discipline, and performance management. Opportunity to work closely with Sales, Trade Marketing, and Finance stakeholders. About Us The Kraft Heinz Company is one of the largest food and beverage companies in the world, with eight $1 billion+ brands and global sales of approximately $25 billion. We’re a globally trusted producer of high-quality, great-tasting, and nutritious foods for over 150 years. Our brands are truly global, with products produced and marketed in over 40 countries. These beloved products include condiments and sauces, cheese and dairy, meals, meats, refreshment beverages, coffee, infant and nutrition products, and numerous other grocery products in a portfolio of more than 200 legacy and emerging brands. No matter the brand, we’re united under one vision To sustainably grow by delighting more consumers globally. Bringing this vision to life is our team of 39,000+ food lovers, creative thinkers, and high performers worldwide. Together, we help provide meals to those in need through our global partnership with Rise Against Hunger. We also stand committed to responsible, sustainable practices that extend to every facet of our business, our consumers, and our communities. Every day, we’re transforming the food industry with bold thinking and unprecedented results. If you share our passion – and are ready to create the future, build a legacy, and lead as a global citizen – there’s only one thing to do join our table and let’s make life delicious! Our Culture of Ownership, Meritocracy and Collaboration We're not afraid to think differently. Embrace new ideas. Dream big. We empower our people at every level – from entry-level intern to senior leader – to own their work. We share a responsibility to think like Owners – to be mindful of the collective and sustained success of Kraft Heinz – which we apply to every situation, every day. As part of Kraft Heinz, you're supported to grow and achieve. You’re expected to bring your authentic self to work every day, to lead with humility, and drive outstanding performance at every level – and you’ll be rewarded. You’re given opportunities to leave a mark and build a legacy. But you won’t do it alone. You’re supported by passionate teammates along the way, and our collective, collaborative spirit fuels our incredible progress. Employee Candidate Privacy Notice https //www.heinz.eu/turkey-candidate-privacy-policy We are proud to be a Great Place to Work certified company. title: Process Engineering Intern, Forward Program
description: Autoliv, a global leader in automotive safety systems, is seeking a motivated Process Engineering Intern to join our Forward Program at the Gebze plant. We manufacture and market airbags, seatbelts and steering wheels. This internship offers practical, hands‑on experience in process engineering activities, project work and continuous improvement within a manufacturing environment. Key Responsibilities Support process engineering tasks across production lines, including process mapping, time studies and capacity analysis. Assist in the development and implementation of standard work, process flows and work instructions to improve efficiency and quality. Support continuous improvement projects using Lean tools, Poke Yoke, root cause analysis (8D) and data‑driven problem solving. Collaborate with cross‑functional teams (production, maintenance, quality, project management) and report progress to project owners and management. Skills & Knowledge Strong written and verbal communication skills in English Proficient in MS Office applications (Word, Excel, Outlook) Ability to handle confidential information with discretion and professionalism Comfortable working both independently and as part of a team A motivated, solution-oriented mindset with a strong willingness to learn Who Are We Looking For? 3rd year bachelor’s degree students studying Industrial, Mechanical, Manufacturing or related fields Available to work a minimum of 3–4 days per week Previous internship or project experience in manufacturing or industrial settings is desirable but not essential Interest in project work, process optimisation and continuous improvement 🌍 Equal Opportunities Autoliv is an inclusive employer and welcomes applications from candidates of all backgrounds. All qualified applicants are considered without regard to gender, identity, ethnicity, or ability. Role Location Kocaeli-Gebze Show more Show less

title: İnsan Kaynakları İş Ortağı
description: Başarıya Değeriz Köklü bir kurumda, yaşama değen projelerle kariyerinizde fark yaratmak ister misiniz? Yanıtınız evetse bize katılın! Yüz yıldan fazladır ülke ve dünya için değer yaratan Yıldızlar Yatırım Holding bünyesinde görev yapacak İnsan Kaynakları İş Ortağı ekip arkadaşı arıyoruz. İnsan Kaynakları İş Ortağı olarak bize katılmak için; Üniversitelerin ilgili bölümlerinden mezun, (İşletme, Psikoloji, Çalışma Ekonomisi, Endüstri Mühendisliği vb.) İnsan Kaynakları alanında en az 2 yıl tecrübeli, (tercihen HRBP rolünde) İş Kanunu ve SGK mevzuatı konusunda bilgi sahibi, Seçme-yerleştirme, performans yönetimi ve organizasyonel gelişim konularında deneyimli, SAP ve MS Office programlarını iyi seviyede kullanabilen, İyi seviyede İngilizce bilen, Microsoft Office programlarını etkin kullanabilen, Yazılı ve sözlü iletişim becerisi gelişmiş, ekip çalışmasına yatkın ve insan ilişkileri kuvvetli ve temsil yeteneği güçlü, Analitik düşünebilen, detaylara önem veren, titiz ve dikkatli, Öğrenmeye açık ve gelişim odaklı, Planlama becerileri gelişmiş, önceliklendirme ve organizasyon yetkinliklerine sahip. İnsan Kaynakları İş Ortağı görevleri: Yetenek kazanımı süreçlerini yöneterek şirket için en uygun adayların bulunmasını ve işe alım süreçlerinin baştan uca yürütülmesini sağlamak. Oryantasyon ve onboarding süreçlerini planlamak ve uygulamak. Görev tanımlarını oluşturmak, güncellemek ve organizasyonel ihtiyaçlara göre geliştirmek. Organizasyonel değişiklikleri (yeni pozisyonlar, görev değişiklikleri, terfi ve ayrılıklar vb.) sistemlere ve organizasyon şemasına yansıtmak, düzenli olarak güncellenmesi ve doğruluğunun kontrol edilmesini sağlamak. İletişim stratejileri ve hedefleri doğrultusunda işveren markası ve iç iletişim faaliyetlerine destek vermek. İletişim stratejileri doğrultusunda intranet içerik ve süreçlerine destek vermek. Performans Yönetim Sistemi, Yetenek Yönetim Sistemi, Eğitim süreçlerine destek vermek. Eğitim ve gelişim faaliyetlerini takip etmek. Çalışan deneyimi ve çalışan bağlılığı sürecine destek olmak, projelerde yer almak. Üniversite iş birlikleri süreçlerinde rol almak. Staj programlarını yürütmek, stajyer deneyimini geliştirecek uygulamaların tasarlanmasına destek vermek. İK politika ve prosedürlerini hazırlamak. İK projelerinde aktif rol almak ve süreç iyileştirme çalışmalarına katkı sağlamak. Show more Show less

title: DİMES Staj Programları (İstanbul, İzmir, Tokat, Aydın)
description:
İlan Tanımı

Kurucumuz Mustafa Vasfi Diren‘in Ziraat Mektebi defterine, mezun olduğu gün not düştüğü “Bugün derslere son verdik, hayırlısıyla şu imtihanları da atlatırsak memleketimize hayırlı bir eleman olarak hayata atılmış olacağız.” sözleriyle başladı hikâyemiz. Memleketin meyvesi bol ve çeşitliydi ama birbirinden lezzetli, sofralık meyveler değerlendirilemiyor ve çiftçinin tüm çabası heba oluyordu. Kurucumuz, halkı için her zaman en iyisini üretmek ilkesinden hiç şaşmadı ve 1963 yılında “Soframıza koymayacağımız meyveyi işleyemeyiz, çocuğumuza içirmeyeceğimiz meyve suyunu üretmeyiz.” dedi, bugünlerimize ışık tuttu.

Türkiye’nin yerel sermaye ile kurulan ilk meyve suyu markası olarak köklerimizden gelen bu kalite anlayışımızla tohumdan, evlerinize giren DİMES ürünlerine kadar tüm süreçleri kendimiz yönetiyor, DİMES lezzetinden nesillerdir emin oluyoruz.

Bugün Türkiye’nin en büyük meyve suyu üreticisi olmanın, evlerde en fazla içilen* ve 100’den fazla ülkeye ihracat yapan meyve suyu olmanın gururu ve sorumluluğu, meyvenin o yalın haline tutkumuz ile yorulmadan çalışıyoruz.

İnsana ve doğaya her zaman başka bakıyoruz; çiftçilerimiz, iş ortaklarımız ve tüketicilerimizle sürdürülebilir bir değer zinciri yarattığımızı biliyoruz ve gelecek nesiller için yatırımlarımıza devam ediyoruz.

DİMES Ailesi olarak, bu ailenin bir ferdi olmaktan gurur duyan, birbirine güvenen, temel insani değerlere saygılı, tutkulu, istekli, motivasyonu yüksek, kendisini ve işini sürekli geliştirmeyi hedefleyen 1032 kişiyiz…

DİMES Staj Programı ve ya GENÇ DİMESLİ Staj Programı ile aramıza katılıp sende bu ailenin bir parçası olmak istemez misin?

DİMES Staj Programı ve ya GENÇ DİMESLİ Staj Programı için başvuru şartları nelerdir?

- Üniversitelerin tercihen Mühendislik, İİBF ve Ticari Bilimler Fakültelerinde 3. veya 4. sınıf lisans ya da yüksek lisans öğrencisi,

- Genç DİMES’li Staj programı için yaz döneminde (Temmuz-Ağustos) 6 haftalık süreçte 5 gün çalışabilecek,

- DİMES Staj Programı için Yaz döneminde (Temmuz-Ağustos) staj süreci boyunca 5 gün çalışabilecek, okul döneminde haftada en az 3 gün katılım sağlayabilecek,

- Hızlı tüketim sektörüne ilgi duyan,

- Çözüm odaklı ve analitik bakış açısına sahip,

- Yazılı ve sözlü iletişim yetkinlikleri güçlü,

- İyi derecede MS Office programlarını kullanabilen,

- İyi derecede İngilizce bilgisine sahip,

- İstanbul, Tokat ve İzmir'de ikamet eden,

- İstanbul Genel Müdürlük Ofisi için Hybrid düzende çalışmaya uygun.

GENÇ DİMESLİ Staj Programında Seni Neler Bekliyor?

- Samimi bir ortamda profesyonel hayatı gözlemleyebileceği çalışma fırsatı,

- Alanında uzman yöneticilerin deneyimlerinden faydalanabileceğin bir mentorluk programı,

- ÖĞRENDİMES markası ile mesleki ve kişisel gelişimine katkı sağlayacak eğitim ve gelişim fırsatları,

- EĞLENDİMES markası ile çalışırken eğlenebileceğin aktivite imkanları,

- İşe alımdan başlayarak hiçbir süreçte yaş, cinsiyet, din, dil, ırk, etnik köken gibi nedenlere dayalı herhangi bir ayrım yapılmayan bir şirkette rahat çalışma ortamı,

- Dinamik, yeniliğe açık bir takımın bir parçası olma fırsatı,

- Staj sonrası ihtiyaca göre uzun dönem stajyer olarak devam etmek, mezun olacak kişiler için uygun olmaları durumunda açık pozisyonlarda değerlendirilme imkânı bulma,

- Yapacağın araştırma sunumlarıyla fikirlerini özgürce sunabilme,

- Staj başlangıcında Sanal Gerçeklik sayesinde detaylı merkez ve fabrika oryantasyon sunumu ile karşılanma,

- Staj bitiminde, yönetim ekibine yapılacak olan proje sunumu deneyimi.

title: Talent Express Internship Program
description:
Fast-track your future

Dijital sipariş ve yeni nesil teslimat teknolojileri alanındaki güçlü deneyimimizle, milyonlarca kullanıcıya her gün hızlı, akıllı ve yenilikçi çözümler sunuyoruz.

Tıkla Gelsin ve fiyuu olarak operasyon, teknoloji ve müşteri deneyimini odağımıza alıyor; geleceğin dijital dünyasını bugünden inşa ediyoruz.
Şimdi, bu hızlı dünyanın bir parçası olma sırası sende!

📅 Başvuru Tarihleri:
16 Şubat – 9 Nisan 🗓 Program Süreci:
6 Temmuz – 28 Ağustos

Talent Express ile Seni Neler Bekliyor?

-
Programın ilk döneminde alacağın kapsamlı oryantasyon ve iş başı eğitimleriyle sağlam bir temel oluşturma fırsatı,

-
Deneyimli ekipler ve mentörler eşliğinde, gerçek projelerde aktif rol alarak teorik bilgini pratiğe dönüştürme imkânı,

-
Operasyon, teknoloji, veri, pazarlama ve dijital iş geliştirme süreçlerinde uçtan uca deneyim kazanma fırsatı,

-
Hızlı karar alma, dinamik ekip çalışması ve yüksek etki alanı sunan bir çalışma ortamı.
Burada sadece izleyen değil, üreten ve katkı sağlayan tarafta olacaksın.

Aranan Nitelikler

-
Üniversite 2., 3. veya 4. sınıf öğrencisiysen ve program süresince aktif katılım sağlayabileceğine inanıyorsan,

-
Dijital platformlar, teknoloji ve e-ticaret ekosisteminde kariyerine güçlü bir başlangıç yapmak istiyorsan,

-
Yeni teknolojileri öğrenmeye açık, kendini sürekli geliştirme motivasyonuna sahipsen,

-
Farklı bakış açılarıyla yaratıcı fikirler üretmekten ve projeleri hayata geçirme süreçlerini deneyimlemekten heyecan duyuyorsan,

-
Hızlı tempoya uyum sağlayabileceğini ve sorumluluk almaktan çekinmediğini düşünüyorsan,

Talent Express Internship Program tam sana göre!

Programı başarıyla tamamlayan genç yeteneklerimize Başarı Sertifikası iletilecektir.
Ayrıca ilerleyen dönemlerdeki genç yetenek fırsatlarımız için değerlendirilme şansı yakalayabilirsin.

Hazırsan, fast-track your future.

description:

title: Experience McKinsey Summer Program
description:
Curious what does McKinsey do anyway? Are you passionate about problem-solving and navigating complex situations? If yes, we invite you to join us for the Experience McKinsey Summer Program and make the first step towards entering the exciting world of consulting.

During this three-day program, you will get first-hand insights on how you can sharpen your problem-solving, presentation and communication skills, as well as stretch your imagination and come up with innovative solutions to the day-to-day challenges faced by McKinsey consultants. Additionally, you will be able to meet colleagues from our Istanbul office, hear personal stories from our consultants, and get answers to your questions.

Everyone has a unique story, we want to hear yours.

What to expect

Program

During June 24th-26th, we will give you an insider’s look into McKinsey Istanbul. You will be coached on how to best leverage your leadership and communication skills, and will work collaboratively with our consultants in small teams on a real-life business case, similar to the one you may experience during the consulting interviews.

title: HTalent 2026 Summer Term Internship Program
description:
HTalent is a short-term summer internship program which seeks high motivated university students to offer them a real time work experiences in our company. During this 20-day period , you will discover & demonstrate your competencies with the assigned project.

What kind of talents we are looking for?

-
Undergraduate degree university students from the related departments (Engineering, Business Administration, Social Sciences or related field.)

-
Have a minimum 2.5 or higher GPA

-
Have strong communication skills in English (written & spoken)

-
Self-driven, proactive, eager to learn and strong team player

-
Able to reside in Kocaeli / İstanbul during the internship period.

In which locations and departments can HTalents work?

İzmit Plant:
Production (Press, Body, Paint, Assembly), Production Operation (Engineering, Production Management, Part Supply management), Production Support (Maintenance, Facility), Quality (Quality Control, Advanced Quality, Quality Assurance), Information & Communication Technologies, People & Culture, Finance (Cost Analysis, Cost Accounting), Corporate Communication, General Affairs, Procurement (Part Development, Purchasing)

İstanbul Office:
People & Culture, Sales, After Sales, Marketing, Finance (Business Analysis, Corporate Accounting), Information & Communication Technologies

Please note that:
Mandatory internship insurance must be covered by university.

With this program you will have the chance to:

-
Experience in a global level job environment and recognized internationally

-
Boost your creativity and innovative thinking through project presentation

-
Expand your perspective with inspiring executive talks

-
Build your professional network and take a confident step toward your future career

Internship Periods:

Izmit Plant:
13 July - 10 August / 11 August - 7 September

Istanbul Office:
15 June - 10 July / 13 July - 10 August / 11 August - 7 September

Do you desire to reach your full potential? Now it's your turn, click the apply button!

Don't forget! The last application date is 18th of April 2026.

title: Koç Genç Yetenek Programı
description:
Kariyerine güçlü bir başlangıç yapmak ve Türkiye’nin öncü şirketlerini daha yakından tanımak istiyorsan, Koç Genç Yetenek Programı radarına alman gereken programlardan biri.

Koç Topluluğu’nun enerji, otomotiv, dayanıklı tüketim, finans, teknoloji, perakende ve turizm gibi birçok sektörde faaliyet gösteren şirketleriyle tanışma fırsatı sunan bu program, yalnızca bir staj deneyimi değil; aynı zamanda kariyerini şekillendirecek çok aşamalı bir gelişim yolculuğu vadediyor. Programın ilk adımı Koç Genç Yetenek Zirvesi . Zirvede üst düzey yöneticiler ve ilham verici konuşmacılarla buluşma, şirketleri yakından tanıma ve gün boyu etkinliklere katılma fırsatı sunuluyor.

Programın devamında adayları, Koç kültürünü gerçek deneyimlerle keşfedebilecekleri bir süreç bekliyor. Sitede öne çıkarılan deneyimler arasında üst düzey yöneticilerle buluşmalar, Koç Holding ziyareti ve prova mülakat, şirketlerde shadowing day, 1-1 mentorluk görüşmeleri, gönüllülük aktivitesi, yapay zekâ eğitimleri, hackathon ve ideathon katılımları ile farklı şirket ve lokasyonlarda teknik geziler yer alıyor.

Kimler başvurabilir?

-
Üniversitelerin 2. sınıf ve üzeri lisans öğrencileri

-
Lisansüstü eğitimine devam eden öğrenciler

Programda seni neler bekliyor?

-
Koç Topluluğu şirketlerini yakından tanıma

-
Kariyer zirvesine katılım

-
Gerçek iş ortamını deneyimleme

-
Mentorluk ve prova mülakat fırsatları

-
Hackathon, teknik gezi ve networking buluşmaları

-
Programın sonunda Koç Topluluğu şirketlerinde staj fırsatı

Adaylardan ne bekleniyor?

Sitenin görünen bölümünde klasik ilan formatında ayrı bir “aradığımız profil” listesi yer almıyor. Ancak program yapısından bakıldığında; farklı sektörleri keşfetmeye açık, kariyerine erken yön vermek isteyen, zirve ve deneyim aşamalarına aktif katılım gösterebilecek, öğrenmeye ve network kurmaya istekli öğrenciler için tasarlandığı açıkça görülüyor. Bu kısım, sayfadaki program akışına dayalı bir çıkarım.

Son başvuru:
19 Nisan

title: TalenTree 2026 Staj Programı
description:
Genç yeteneklerin enerjisini, Kastamonu Entegre’nin yarım asrı aşkın deneyimiyle buluşturan TalenTree 2026 için başvurular başladı. 🌱

Brandon Hall Group ve Stevie ödüllü bu staj programı; öğrenmeye açık, üretmek isteyen ve kariyer yolculuğuna güçlü bir adım atmak isteyen üniversite öğrencileri için tasarlandı.

Eğer üniversite 2. veya 3. sınıf öğrencisiysen, İngilizcene güveniyorsan ve global bir organizasyonun içinde yer alarak gerçek deneyim kazanmak istiyorsan, TalenTree tam sana göre.

Bu programda sadece bir staj deneyimi yaşamayacak; aynı zamanda keşfedecek, üretecek, farklı ekiplerle birlikte çalışacak ve inovasyon projelerinde aktif rol alacaksın. Kendini geliştirebileceğin, katkı sunabileceğin ve potansiyelini gösterebileceğin bir yolculuk seni bekliyor.

Kastamonu Entegre’nin köklü deneyimiyle şekillenen bu program, genç yeteneklere iş dünyasını yakından tanıma, profesyonel becerilerini geliştirme ve gelecekteki kariyerleri için güçlü bir temel oluşturma fırsatı sunuyor.

Kariyerine fark yaratan bir başlangıç yapmak istiyorsan, hemen başvur!

Son başvuru tarihi: 19 Nisan 📅

title: Yaz Dönemi Sütajyer 2026
description:
Sütaş’ın Yaz Dönemi Staj Programı: SÜTAJYER başlıyor!

Sütün iyiliğini ve bereketini yayma tutkusu ile çalışan, kocaman bir aileyiz. Şimdi bu ailenin bir parçası olma sırası sende!

💚 SÜTAJYER Programı ile:

-
Atölyeler, kişisel gelişim eğitimleri

-
Sütçülük Merkezi ziyareti 🐄🥛

-
Kariyer koçluğu

-
Gerçek iş deneyimleri, proje çalışmaları ve sunum fırsatları

📍 İstanbul-Grup Merkezi, Bursa-Karacabey, İzmir-Tire, Aksaray ve Bingöl lokasyonlarında yaz döneminde dopdolu bir deneyim sizi bekliyor!

Başvuru Koşulları:

-
Üniversitelerin İktisadi İdari Bilimler, Sosyal Bilimler, Veterinerlik, Zootekni ve Mühendislik Fakültelerinde 3.
ve 4. sınıf lisans öğrencisi isen,

-
2 ay boyunca, haftada 5 gün staj programımıza devam edebilecek durumdaysan,

-
İngilizce dil bilgisine ve MS Office programlarını etkin kullanma becerisine sahipsen,

-
Hızlı tüketim sektörüne ilgi duyuyor ve kariyerinizi bu alanda şekillendirmek istiyorsan,

-
Başvurulan bölgelerde ikamet eden / edebilecek durumda isen.

Haydi, başvuru zamanı! Aşağıdaki linke tıklayarak başvurunu yapabilirsin! 👇

Son başvuru:
12 Nisan

title: Genç Pythian Kariyer Akademisi
description:
Geleceğini şekillendirecek kariyer yolculuğuna hazır mısın?

Kariyerine “bir gün” demek yerine bugün başlamak ister misin?

PythianGo tarafından hayata geçirilen online, ücretsiz ve sertifikalı Genç Pythian Kariyer Akademisi , üniversite öğrencilerini gerçek iş dünyasıyla buluşturmak, kariyer farkındalığı kazandırmak ve güçlü bir profesyonel çevre oluşturmak amacıyla tasarlanmış özel bir gelişim programıdır.

Alanında lider şirketlerin katkılarıyla gerçekleşecek bu akademi; seni yalnızca bilgiyle değil, vizyon, deneyim ve güçlü bağlantılarla donatmayı hedefler.

Bu programda yalnızca dinleyen değil;

soru soran, deneyimleyen ve kariyerini aktif olarak inşa eden biri olacaksın.

Akademide Seni Neler Bekliyor?

-
Gerçek İş Dünyasıyla Tanışma:
Alanında lider markaların yöneticileriyle bir araya gelecek, iş dünyasının dinamiklerini doğrudan profesyonellerden dinleyeceksin.

-
İlham Veren Kariyer Zirveleri:
Kariyer yolculuklarını paylaşan liderlerin hikâyeleriyle yeni bakış açıları kazanacaksın.

-
Güçlü Bir Network:
Farklı üniversitelerden öğrenciler, sektör profesyonelleri ve mentorlarla tanışarak güçlü bir kariyer ağı kurma fırsatı yakalayacaksın.

-
Kariyer Eğitimleri:
İş dünyasında fark yaratmanı sağlayacak beceriler üzerine eğitimler alacaksın.

Bu Akademi Kimler İçin?

Genç Pythian Kariyer Akademisi;

-
Üniversite öğrencileri

-
Kariyerine erken yön vermek isteyenler

-
Öğrenmeye ve gelişmeye açık olanlar

-
Yeni insanlarla tanışmayı ve network kurmayı isteyenler

-
Kendini geleceğin iş dünyasına hazırlamak isteyenler için tasarlanmıştır.

Eğer kariyerine güçlü bir başlangıç yapmak istiyorsan, bu akademi tam sana göre.

Son Başvuru Tarihi:
12 Nisan Kontenjan sınırlı!

Genç Pythian Kariyer Akademisi’nde yerini almak ve kariyer yolculuğuna güçlü bir adım atmak için başvurunu şimdi tamamla.

Başvurunu hemen yap.

title: T-RUN Internship Program 2026
description:
Token Financial Technologies is a company of Koç Group, the largest conglomerate in Turkey. Token produces revolutionary, innovative products, value-added retail, and payment services to retailers and creates a safe open platform for the Fintech ecosystem. Token creates the devices and infrastructures to deliver intelligent payment and retail platforms, which shape future products and services while creating new revenue streams.

T-RUN Summer Internship Program 2026 is now open! Come and run your career!

WHY SHOULD YOU APPLY?

-
Dynamic Brands:
You can gain global working experience

with our dynamic brands.
Beko

(pos machine and fuel payment) , TokenFlex (digital card solutions) , Ödero

(online payment system)

-
Industry Leader:
We lead the payment systems industry with more than 50% market share and we are Turkey’s leading platform provider empowered by our 800K+ users.

-
Real Experience:
Opportunity to take on challenging responsibilies, improve technical and competency skills, and continuously learn with a hybrid internship program.

-
Development and Job Opportunities:
Continuous mentoring from senior team members, access to Koç Academy platform which offers many trainings, career development webinars, and agile working experience.
At the end of the program, you can get a part-time job opportunity!

WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR?

-
Students in their 3rd or 4th year of undergraduate study,

-
Ability to participate at least 4 days a week in summer,

-
Excellent command of oral and written English,

-
Motivated to shape payment systems with us.

Our short-term summer internship program will start in this July!

Application Process

📝 Application:
20 February - 13 April

⏳ Pre Selection:
13 April – 20 April

✍ Exams:
20 April – 27 April

🔍 Final Selection:
27 April – 11 May

✅ Results:
11 May – 20 May

title: İstanbul Senin Staj Senin Programı
description:
İstanbul Büyükşehir Belediyesi tarafından hayata geçirilen İstanbul Senin Staj Senin Programı, lise ve üniversite öğrencilerine yönelik kapsamlı bir staj programıdır.

Program kapsamında öğrenciler, İstanbul'un dinamik ve çok yönlü yapısını yakından tanıma fırsatı bulurken; aynı zamanda mesleki bilgi ve becerilerini geliştirebilecekleri gerçek iş deneyimleri kazanırlar.

Her yıl gençler, İstanbul Büyükşehir Belediyesi'nin müdürlük, idare ve iştirak şirketlerinin farklı birimlerinde görev alarak teorik bilgilerini pratiğe dönüştürme ve profesyonel iş hayatına güçlü bir başlangıç yapma imkânı elde etmektedir.

Aranılan Nitelikler

-
Lise, ön lisans ve lisans öğrencisiysen,

-
Gönüllü veya zorunlu staj sigortan okulun tarafından karşılanıyorsa,

-
Öğrenmeye açık, yenilikçi fikirlerin ve projelerin bir parçası olmak istiyorsan,

-
İstanbul'u seviyor ve bu şehre katkı sunmak istiyorsan,

Sen de bu deneyimin parçası ol!

Başvurunu hemen yap, kariyer yolculuğuna güçlü bir adım at.

title: Doğanı Keşfet Staj Programı
description:
Doğanı Keşfet Staj Programımız kapsamında, üniversite 3. ve 4. sınıf ya da yüksek lisans öğrencilerini yaz döneminde stajyer olarak değerlendiriyoruz. Doğanı Keşfet stajyerlerimiz, staja başladıkları ilk gün itibarıyla deneyimli Doğanlılar ile birlikte öğreniyor, gelişiyor, projelerde yer alıyor ve katkı yaratıyor. Böylelikle kariyerlerine bir adım önde başlıyor. Mezun olan stajyerleri mutlaka grup içerisinde değerlendiriyor ve açık pozisyonlar olması durumunda işe alımlarını gerçekleştiriyoruz.

Yeteneklerini keşfetmek, kendini sürekli geliştirmek doğanda varsa senin yerin Doğan.

Doğan Holding senin değerinin farkında, değer katmak için yanında!

Başvuru Koşulları

Nasıl bir kaşif arıyoruz?

-
3. veya 4. sınıfa geçmiş olmak, yeni mezun olmuş olmak ya da yüksek lisans öğrencisi olmak
- İyi seviyede İngilizce bilgisine sahip olmak
- Program süresi boyunca haftada en az 3 gün çalışabilecek duruma olmak
- Haziran-Eylül ayları arasında minimum 2 ay staj yapmaya hazır olmak
- İletişim becerileri güçlü, yeni deneyimler kazanmak için heyecanlı olmak

Doğanı Keşfet, Kariyerini Başlat!

Birbirinden farklı yedi sektörde faaliyet gösteren Doğan Holding ve şirketlerinde birlikte başarmaya, yenilik katmaya, birbirinden önemli projelerde rol almaya, potansiyelini ortaya koymaya hazır mısın?

Doğanı Keşfet Staj Programı’yla kariyerine atacağın ilk adım için seni bekliyoruz!

title: Kuantum Teknolojileri Yarışması
description:
TEKNOFEST Teknoloji yarışmaları kapsamında Kuantum Teknolojileri Yarışması düzenlenmektedir.

TEKNOFEST bünyesinde düzenlenen Kuantum Teknolojileri Yarışması, genç bilim insanı adaylarını kuantum teknolojilerine yönlendirmeyi, bu alanda bilgi ve beceri kazanmalarını teşvik etmeyi amaçlamaktadır. Yarışma, katılımcıların sadece teknik açıdan değil, aynı zamanda stratejik düşünme ve iş birliği becerilerini geliştirmelerine de katkı sağlar. Aynı zamanda kuantum farkındalığının toplumda yaygınlaşmasını, bu alana ilgi duyan gençlerin bir araya gelerek deneyim paylaşmalarını ve Türkiye’de sürdürülebilir bir kuantum ekosisteminin oluşmasını desteklemektedir.

Yarışma iki kategoride düzenlenecektir:

-
Yazılım Kategorisi

-
Donanım Kategorisi

Donanım Kategorisi

Süperiletken kuantum işlemciler üzerinde gerçek zamanlı ölçüm, kalibrasyon ve performans analizleri gerçekleştirebilen donanım ve kontrol–okuma altyapılarının geliştirilmesini hedefleyen; katılımcıların transmon kübit tasarımından başlayarak seyreltili soğutucu sistemleri üzerinde T₁, T₂ ve kapı verimliliği ölçümlerine uzanan deneysel süreçleri uygulamalı olarak deneyimledikleri bir kuantum teknolojileri yarışmasıdır.

Türkiye’de ve yurt dışında öğrenim gören lisans ve yüksek lisans öğrencileri katılabilir. Takımlar en az 3 (üç) en fazla 5 (beş) kişiden oluşur. Takımlar opsiyonel olarak takım üyelerini destekleyecek mahiyette 1 kişiyi danışman olarak takımına ekleyebilirler.

Donanım Kategorisi; Ön Aşama, Eğitim Aşaması ve Final Aşamasından oluşmaktadır.

Yazılım Kategorisi

Yarışma detayları önümüzdeki günlerde duyurulacaktır.

title: Driver Operations Intern
description: Lalamove is disrupting the logistics industry by connecting customers and drivers directly through our technology. We offer customers a lightning-fast and convenient way to book delivery and moving services whether they are at home, at work, or on the go. Currently, Lalamove is a leading global on-demand delivery platform with millions of delivery partners serving millions of orders every day. With 1600+ employees spread across SEA and LATAM, our 12-year-old company reached unicorn status in 2018, is well-funded by prominent VCs, and has kept growing at tremendous speed since. Our strength lies in our internal values: Passion in serving local communities, empowering SMEs, and our driver partners; Execution and Grit because that is how we differentiate ourselves by never giving up and striving for excellence; and Humility – awareness in ourselves to learn from others and never stop improving. We are looking for a Driver Operations Intern to join our growing Marketing Team in Turkey!. The role is ideal for students who enjoy working with data, problem-solving, and supporting operational processes. Join us and be part of Lalamove’s exciting journey in Turkey! 💛 What You Will Do? Assist in day-to-day driver operations and support operational efficiency Collect, analyze, and interpret operational data to identify trends and insights Collaborate with the team to optimize processes and resolve operational issues Support reporting and dashboard creation in Excel and other MS Office tools What We Seek? Third- or fourth-year undergraduate student in Business Administration, Economics, Industrial Engineering, or related fields Fluent in written and spoken English Strong analytical and problem-solving skills P roficient in MS Office applications, especially Excel Able to understand and interpret data effectively Good communication skills and ability to work in a team Curious, creative, and result-oriented with a growth mindset Highly self-motivated, flexible, and energetic To all candidates: Lalamove respects your privacy and is committed to protecting your personal data. This Notice will inform you how we will use your personal data, explain your privacy rights, and the protection you have by the law when you apply to join us. Please take time to read and understand this Notice. Candidate Privacy Notice: https://www.lalamove.com/en-hk/candidate-privacy-notice We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us. Show more Show less

title: Global Expansion Intern
description: Founded in 2012, Obilet.com is a leading travel and tourism platform offering comprehensive services, including bus, flight, and ferry ticketing, along with hotel bookings and car rentals. As the undisputed market leader in Turkey across both B2B and B2C segments, the platform supports bus carriers with its best-in-class SaaS Inventory Management System (IMS), attracts 25 million monthly visitors, and boasts 15 million app downloads. Projected to mediate over 50 million transactions in 2025, Obilet is expanding internationally to become one of the largest global players in the travel tech industry. Main responsibilities will include: Support our global expansion team Create strategies with the global expansion team Research and analyze competitors, industry trends, and markets Analyze ongoing business developments, identify relevant teams and ensure effective communication Support all operations and projects of all foreign country businesses To be successful in this role, you need to have: Strong analytical capabilities Fluency in English both written and oral Person interested in new products, tracking trends Excellent knowledge of Google Sheets & Microsoft Office Programs Very good communication and interpersonal skills AI project or experienced is nice to have What we offer: 🏠 Hybrid Working: We work hybrid, but our offices are always open for us 🎂 Birthday Leave: In the month of our birthday, we can take a day off on any day we choose 📅 Flexible Working Hours: On the days we come to the office, we set our own start time with our flexible working model 🎉 Happy Hours & Company Events: With our New Year’s Event, #obiletfest and Happy Hours, we not only strive for success but also have a lot of fun along the way 📚 Self-Development: Your growth is our focus, with access to online learning platforms like Udemy and various training programs designed to support your professional development 🌟 Best-in-class Teammates: We are all the best in our fields and we are confident about it 🤠 No Dress Code: We have no dress code. We can set the trend in our office with our style ☕ Free Snacks & Drinks: Surprise breakfasts, desserts and fruits might be waiting for us in our office Show more Show less

title: Long Term Intern (Consultancy)
description: Responsibilities: What Will You Do? Project Support: Support the planning and coordination of various HR-related projects to ensure high-quality delivery and timely compliance with project requirements. Data Analytics and Insights: Assist in collecting, analyzing, and generating insights from data to support / facilitate decision-making processes for our clients. Client Exposure: Observe client meetings to understand their needs and priorities, supporting the team in managing client expectations throughout the project lifecycle. Reporting and Presentation: Contribute to preparing project deliverables and presentations, supporting the team in sharing strategic recommendations and reporting results. Industry Research: Conduct research on sector trends and best practices in HR, contributing relevant insights to ongoing projects. Solution Development: Support the development of creative and effective solutions to address client challenges, contributing to their strategic goals. Qualifications: What Are We Looking For? 4th year university student or recent graduate in Engineering, Business Administration, Economics, Psychology or related fields (preferably) - Internship experience is a plus Strong analytical and problem-solving skills Excellent communication and presentation abilities Team player with a strong willingness to learn and grow in consulting Ability to think critically and strategically Detail-oriented with a focus on quality and results Curiosity about consultancy, especially in organizational design, HR systems, and performance management What We Offer We adapt conventional global management consulting experience into a new generation working experience and offer the opportunity to work with an experienced and specialized team that stands out in the industry. Availability to work full-time or minimum 3 days per week, depending on academic schedule. As a young and rapidly growing consulting company, we offer a modern consulting experience focused on innovation, empathy and productivity, where you’ll be part of a forward-thinking environment, contributing to impactful projects. The opportunity to be part of a dynamic and innovative company where you can contribute while learning how consulting projects are designed and delivered. A strong learning environment where you can discover your potential and develop foundational consulting skills. Collaboration with leading companies across various industries. Flexible working options and personalized development support. About Us Consult Up, founded in 2017, provides organizational, process, and system solutions to companies across various industries. We work with leading firms in Turkey and worldwide, offering consultancy services in workforce planning, human resources systems, and performance management. Our projects focus on strategic workforce management, organizational structuring, employee experience, and talent management. We combine global best practices with technological advancements to deliver sustainable solutions that make a lasting impact. Our approach is client-centered, always involving key stakeholders and creating guides to ensure long-term usability. Join us and become part of a team that values innovation, analytics, and client-driven results. We aim to create signature projects that make a real difference for both organizations and individuals. Show more Show less

title: Demand Planner
description: Job Description About the Position To be the responsible for the Demand Planning/ SNOP routines and AOP budget of the commercial units in Turkey. Lead the forecasting cycle with Commercial & Marketing & Finance teams. Been a focus point for long and short term demand discussion to drive sales in the right direction. Owner of the forecast accuracy and BIAS KPIs as well an enabler for Top Line results to be materialized. Key Accountabilities Lead SNOP (forecasting) cycle with Commercial & Marketing and Finance teams. Ensure collaboration within supply chain and commercial teams in demand planning operations. Identify demand forecast risks and develop effective mitigation plans. Develop demand plan based on business trends and demand patterns. Analyze and troubleshoot demand related issues in a timely and accurate manner. Assist in developing annual budgets and cost-effectiveness initiatives. Maintain training materials and organize trainings to team members. Follow and enforce company rules and regulations. Develop routine and ad-hoc demand related reports for management. Schedule demand review meetings with management on regular basis. Owner of Forecast Accuracy and BIAS KPIs and maintain demand planning processes to improve forecast accuracy. Work with multifunctional team to plan, coordinate and execute demand planning activities. Update forecasts for new products, seasonal products, discounts, promotions. Coordinate with inventory team to monitor and maintain optimal inventory levels. Requirements Degree in Engineering or Business Management is preferable 1-3 years working experience in demand roles English level – advanced SAP knowledge is a plus Ability to risk assess and make decisions Work as a Team, team routines, engage with peers' and stakeholders, absorbs feedback to improve. Inspire Excellence, use techniques, action-oriented, getting things done We Own It, focused, task orientation Communication and Interpersonal Skills Analytical and problem-solving ability. Detail-oriented Ability to lead and motivate the team Persistence and ability to influence others The ability to facilitate change What We Offer You A fast career track like only few other companies can match. Always room for new ideas; if you have an excellent idea, please let us know and we can set it in action! About Us The Kraft Heinz Company is one of the largest food and beverage companies in the world, with eight $1 billion+ brands and global sales of approximately $25 billion. We’re a globally trusted producer of high-quality, great-tasting, and nutritious foods for over 150 years. Our brands are truly global, with products produced and marketed in over 40 countries. These beloved products include condiments and sauces, cheese and dairy, meals, meats, refreshment beverages, coffee, infant and nutrition products, and numerous other grocery products in a portfolio of more than 200 legacy and emerging brands. No matter the brand, we’re united under one vision To sustainably grow by delighting more consumers globally. Bringing this vision to life is our team of 39,000+ food lovers, creative thinkers, and high performers worldwide. Together, we help provide meals to those in need through our global partnership with Rise Against Hunger. We also stand committed to responsible, sustainable practices that extend to every facet of our business, our consumers, and our communities. Every day, we’re transforming the food industry with bold thinking and unprecedented results. If you share our passion – and are ready to create the future, build a legacy, and lead as a global citizen – there’s only one thing to do join our table and let’s make life delicious! Our Culture of Ownership, Meritocracy and Collaboration We're not afraid to think differently. Embrace new ideas. Dream big. We empower our people at every level – from entry-level intern to senior leader – to own their work. We share a responsibility to think like Owners – to be mindful of the collective and sustained success of Kraft Heinz – which we apply to every situation, every day. As part of Kraft Heinz, you're supported to grow and achieve. You’re expected to bring your authentic self to work every day, to lead with humility, and drive outstanding performance at every level – and you’ll be rewarded. You’re given opportunities to leave a mark and build a legacy. But you won’t do it alone. You’re supported by passionate teammates along the way, and our collective, collaborative spirit fuels our incredible progress Employee Candidate Privacy Notice https //www.heinz.eu/turkey-candidate-privacy-policy We are proud to be a Great Place to Work certified company.
